overall.assessment: Sadržaj je primarno svjetovnog karaktera, ali duboko zadire u ključna pitanja katoličkog socijalnog nauka kroz prizmu ekološke pravde i sudjelovanja zajednice. Rasprava odražava napetost između potrebe za obnovljivim izvorima energije i zaštite lokalnog ekosustava te dostojanstva mještana. Iako nedostaje izravni teološki okvir, prisutna je snažna težnja za transparentnošću i općim dobrom nasuprot sumnjama u korupciju.
seeds_of_logos: Težnja za energetskom tranzicijom prema obnovljivim izvorima kao odgovor na klimatsku krizu
Aktivno sudjelovanje građana u procesima donošenja odluka koji utječu na njihov životni prostor
Zahtjev za transparentnošću javnih vlasti i odgovornošću investitora
Briga za konkretne utjecaje na zdravlje i kvalitetu života (buka, zasjenjenje škola)
Očuvanje integriteta krškog terena kao dijela zajedničke baštine
concerns: Optužbe za korupciju i netransparentnost koje razaraju društveno povjerenje i državu
Moguće zanemarivanje 'ljudske ekologije' nauštrb isključivo tehnološkog i ekonomskog profita
Rizik od instrumentalizacije prirode i lokalnog stanovništva bez istinskog dijaloga
Potencijalno kršenje prava vlasništva i nepravedna raspodjela koristi od prirodnih resursa
overall.theological_context: Crkva naglašava da je energija 'operator općeg dobra' te da njezina proizvodnja mora biti pravedna i uključiva (Papa Franjo, Govor zaposlenicima Terne, 2024). Enciklika 'Laudato si'' poziva na zamjenu fosilnih goriva obnovljivim izvorima, ali uz strogo poštivanje ekosustava i sudjelovanje lokalnih zajednica (LS 26, 182). Korupcija se osuđuje kao proces koji razara društvo i zanemaruje najranjivije (Papa Franjo, Govor udruzi za kazneno pravo, 2014; Kompendij socijalnog nauka, 470).

sections.subtitle: Dobrodošlica i uvod u javnu raspravu o vjetroelektrani Gradina
sections.screenshot_description: Maja Bevanda iz Federalnog Ministarstva okoliša i turizma otvara javnu raspravu o projektu vjetroelektrane Gradina.
sections.content: Javnu raspravu o projektu izgradnje vjetroelektrane Gradina na području općine Kupres otvorila je **Maja Bevanda**, voditeljica postupka iz Federalnog Ministarstva okoliša i turizma. Ona je pozdravila prisutne u ime Ministarstva i zahvalila se na velikom odazivu. Istaknula je da je svrha okupljanja održavanje javne rasprave u postupku prethodne procjene utjecaja na okoliš za spomenuti projekt.

magisterium.assessment: Uvod postavlja proceduralni okvir za dijalog, što je nužan preduvjet za društvenu suradnju, ali ostaje na razini formalne administracije.
magisterium.enrichment: Opće dobro zahtijeva stvaranje institucija i uvjeta koji omogućuju ljudima lakše postizanje ispunjenja kroz organizirani društveni život.
magisterium.assessment_en: The introduction sets a procedural framework for dialogue, which is a necessary prerequisite for social cooperation, but remains at the level of formal administration.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The common good requires the creation of institutions and conditions that enable people to more easily achieve fulfillment through organized social life.

sections.subtitle_en: Welcome and introduction to the public discussion about the Gradina wind farm
sections.screenshot_description_en: Maja Bevanda from the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism opens a public discussion about the Gradina wind farm project.
sections.content_en: The public discussion on the project of building the Gradina wind farm in the area of the municipality of Kupres was opened by **Maja Bevanda**, the procedure manager from the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism. She greeted those present on behalf of the Ministry and thanked for the large turnout. She pointed out that the purpose of the gathering is holding a public discussion in the procedure of preliminary environmental impact assessment for the mentioned project.
keywords_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Logistika i dnevni red: Transparentnost i fokus na okoliš
sections.screenshot_description: Maja Bevanda objašnjava logistiku javne rasprave, uključujući snimanje za televiziju i redoslijed izlaganja.
sections.content: Gđa Bevanda je detaljno objasnila logističke aspekte rasprave, naglašavajući važnost izlaska pred mikrofon za sve komentare, primjedbe i sugestije, s obzirom na televizijsko snimanje. Dnevni red je uključivao kratak uvod u pravni osnov postupka, prezentaciju samog projekta od strane investitora, te najvažniju točku – diskusiju. Sudionici su zamoljeni da izlažu svoje stavove na što kraći i sažetiji način, uz naglasak na parlamentarnu komunikaciju.

magisterium.assessment: Naglasak na transparentnosti i okolišu usklađen je s potrebom za istinitim informiranjem i odgovornim upravljanjem zajedničkim resursima.
magisterium.enrichment: Istina je temelj pravednog društva; ljudi ne smiju biti obmanuti, a pristup informacijama o 'zajedničkom domu' odražava poštovanje prema njihovom dostojanstvu.
magisterium.assessment_en: The emphasis on transparency and the environment is aligned with the need for truthful informing and responsible management of common resources.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Truth is the foundation of a just society; people must not be deceived, and access to information about the 'common home' reflects respect for their dignity.

sections.subtitle_en: Logistics and agenda: Transparency and focus on the environment
sections.screenshot_description_en: Maja Bevanda explains the logistics of the public debate, including filming for television and the order of presentations.
sections.content_en: Ms. Bevanda explained in detail the logistical aspects of the discussion, emphasizing the importance of coming to the microphone for all comments, remarks, and suggestions, given the television recording. The agenda included a brief introduction to the legal basis of the procedure, a presentation of the project itself by the investor, and the most important point – the discussion. Participants were asked to present their views in the shortest and most concise way possible, with an emphasis on parliamentary communication.

sections.subtitle: Pravni okvir i povijest procjene utjecaja na okoliš
sections.screenshot_description: Maja Bevanda objašnjava pravni osnov postupka prethodne procjene utjecaja na okoliš za vjetroelektranu Gradina.
sections.content: Federalnom Ministarstvu okoliša i turizma podnesen je zahtjev za projekt izgradnje vjetroelektrane Gradina, snage do 100 MW, u formi prethodne procjene utjecaja na okoliš. Gđa Bevanda je pojasnila da je javni uvid već obavljen, a obavijest i sam zahtjev objavljeni su na web stranici Ministarstva. Zaprimljen je značajan broj primjedbi i komentara, na koje je investitor, uz pomoć izrađivača zahtjeva, odgovorio. Ti su odgovori dostavljeni svim zainteresiranim stranama u pisanoj formi.

magisterium.assessment: Čisto tehnički i pravni prikaz povijesti projekta; služi informiranju, ali bez izravnog moralnog vrednovanja ciljeva.
magisterium.enrichment: Pravni okviri moraju služiti promicanju općeg dobra, a ne biti samo formalni instrumenti za postizanje parcijalnih interesa.
magisterium.assessment_en: Purely technical and legal overview of the project's history; serves to inform, but without direct moral evaluation of the goals.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Legal frameworks must serve the promotion of the common good, and not be merely formal instruments for achieving partial interests.

sections.subtitle_en: Legal framework and history of environmental impact assessment
sections.screenshot_description_en: Maja Bevanda explains the legal basis of the preliminary environmental impact assessment procedure for the Gradina wind farm.
sections.content_en: A request for the project of building the Gradina wind farm, with a capacity of up to 100 MW, in the form of a preliminary environmental impact assessment, was submitted to the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism. Ms. Bevanda clarified that the public inspection had already been carried out, and the notice and the request itself were published on the Ministry's website. A significant number of objections and comments were received, to which the investor, with the help of the request's drafter, responded. These responses were delivered to all interested parties in written form.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Zahtjev javnosti za raspravom i fokus na ekološke aspekte
sections.screenshot_description: Maja Bevanda poziva sudionike da se fokusiraju na utjecaj projekta na okoliš, uključujući zrak, tlo, vodu i zdravlje ljudi.
sections.content: Unatoč dostavljenim odgovorima, određeni subjekti, nevladine organizacije i udruženja građana, izrazili su nezadovoljstvo i zatražili održavanje javne rasprave. Federalno Ministarstvo je izašlo u susret ovom zahtjevu, organizirajući raspravu u dogovoru s investitorom. Gđa Bevanda je apelirala na sudionike da se u svojim primjedbama i komentarima usmjere prvenstveno na utjecaj projekta na okoliš, uključujući zrak, tlo, vodu i zdravlje ljudi, s obzirom na nadležnost Ministarstva.

magisterium.assessment: Uključivanje civilnog društva i fokus na ekologiju izravno promiču participaciju i brigu za stvoreni svijet kao zajedničku baštinu.
magisterium.enrichment: Briga za stvorenje je dužnost vjere i znak brige za sve ljude, osobito one najranjivije koji trpe najteže posljedice ekološke degradacije.
magisterium.assessment_en: Inclusion of civil society and focus on ecology directly promote participation and care for the created world as a common heritage.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Care for creation is a duty of faith and a sign of concern for all people, especially the most vulnerable ones who suffer the gravest consequences of ecological degradation.

sections.subtitle_en: Public request for discussion and focus on ecological aspects
sections.screenshot_description_en: Maja Bevanda invites participants to focus on the impact of the project on the environment, including air, soil, water, and human health.
sections.content_en: Despite the submitted answers, certain entities, non-governmental organizations and citizens' associations expressed dissatisfaction and requested a public discussion. The Federal Ministry met this request, organizing a discussion in agreement with the investor. Ms. Bevanda appealed to the participants to focus their remarks and comments primarily on the project's impact on the environment, including air, soil, water and human health, given the Ministry's jurisdiction.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Predstavljanje projekta: 18 godina razvoja i tehnološke inovacije
sections.screenshot_description: Ana Tomas iz Zagreb Inspecta predstavlja povijest i pravni temelj projekta vjetroelektrane Gradina, ističući dugogodišnji razvoj.
sections.content: Projekt vjetroelektrane Gradina, smješten u Tomislav Gradu, predstavila je **Ana Tomas** iz tvrtke Zagreb Inspect, koja je izradila zahtjev za prethodnu procjenu. Istaknula je da je projekt aktivan već osamnaest godina, s prvim okolišnim rješenjem izdanim 2008. godine za 57 turbina. Kroz godine su se mijenjale okolišne dozvole, prilagođavajući se tehnološkim promjenama u vjetroagregatima. Trenutni zahtjev predviđa 17 turbina, svaka snage do 8 MW, s ukupnom instaliranom snagom do 100 MW. Gđa Tomas je naglasila da su ishođene brojne suglasnosti od relevantnih općinskih i državnih tijela, te da je projektna dokumentacija ažurirana, uključujući idejni projekt iz 2025., elaborat o arheološkoj baštini, plan upravljanja otpadom i novu studiju vjetra.

magisterium.assessment: Predstavljanje tehnoloških inovacija i dugog razvoja projekta naglašava ljudsku kreativnost i rad, ali nosi rizik tehnokratske paradigme.
concerns: Moguća instrumentalizacija prirode i ljudi isključivo radi ekonomske učinkovitosti i tehnološkog napretka.
magisterium.enrichment: Dostojanstvo osobe ne ovisi o učinkovitosti; tehnološki napredak mora biti usmjeren na cjeloviti razvoj čovjeka, a ne samo na profit.
magisterium.assessment_en: The presentation of technological innovations and long project development emphasizes human creativity and work, but carries the risk of a technocratic paradigm.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The dignity of the person does not depend on efficiency; technological progress must be directed towards the integral development of man, and not only on profit.
concerns_en: Possible instrumentalization of nature and people exclusively for economic efficiency and technological progress.

sections.subtitle_en: Project presentation: 18 years of development and technological innovation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Ana Tomas from Zagreb Inspecta presents the history and legal basis of the Gradina wind farm project, highlighting the long-term development.
sections.content_en: The Gradina wind farm project, located in Tomislav Grad, was presented by **Ana Tomas** from the company Zagreb Inspect, which prepared the request for preliminary assessment. She pointed out that the project has been active for eighteen years, with the first environmental permit issued in 2008 for 57 turbines. Over the years, environmental permits have changed, adapting to technological changes in wind turbines. The current request foresees 17 turbines, each with a power of up to 8 MW, with a total installed capacity of up to 100 MW. Ms. Tomas emphasized that numerous approvals have been obtained from relevant municipal and state bodies, and that the project documentation has been updated, including the conceptual design from 2025, a study on archaeological heritage, a waste management plan, and a new wind study.

sections.subtitle: Energetska tranzicija i kritike 'političkih floskula'
sections.screenshot_description: Ana Tomas govori o energetskoj tranziciji BiH, dok je Andrijana Čolčić prekida, kritizirajući političke floskule.
sections.content: Gđa Tomas je istaknula neosporan vjetropotencijal područja, potvrđen istraživanjima i prostornim planom Hercegbosanske županije. Naglasila je nužnost ulaganja u obnovljive izvore energije kao dio energetske tranzicije Bosne i Hercegovine. Međutim, njezino izlaganje prekinula je **Andrijana Čolčić**, predstavnica javnosti, kritizirajući korištenje 'političkih floskula' i tražeći da se prezentacija usredotoči isključivo na projekt, a ne na opće političke teme. Gđa Čolčić je istaknula da prisutni nisu došli slušati političke govore, već konkretne informacije o projektu.

magisterium.assessment: Kritika praznih obećanja i poziv na stvarnu energetsku tranziciju odražava hitnost odgovornog upravljanja stvorenim svijetom.
magisterium.enrichment: Opće dobro je veće od zbroja pojedinačnih interesa i zahtijeva zajedničku viziju koja nadilazi ideološke razlike radi očuvanja planeta.
magisterium.assessment_en: Criticism of empty promises and a call for a real energy transition reflects the urgency of responsible stewardship of the created world.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The common good is greater than the sum of individual interests and requires a common vision that transcends ideological differences for the preservation of the planet.

sections.subtitle_en: Energy transition and criticisms of 'political platitudes'
sections.screenshot_description_en: Ana Tomas speaks about the energy transition of BiH, while Andrijana Čolčić interrupts her, criticizing political platitudes.
sections.content_en: Ms. Tomas highlighted the undeniable wind potential of the area, confirmed by research and the spatial plan of Hercegbosanska County. She emphasized the necessity of investing in renewable energy sources as part of the energy transition of Bosnia and Herzegovina. However, her presentation was interrupted by **Andrijana Čolčić**, a representative of the public, criticizing the use of 'political platitudes' and demanding that the presentation focus exclusively on the project, and not on general political topics. Ms. Čolčić pointed out that those present did not come to listen to political speeches, but concrete information about the project.

sections.subtitle: Prednosti lokacije i procjena utjecaja: Buka, zasjenjenje i fauna
sections.screenshot_description: Ana Tomas objašnjava rezultate studije buke i zasjenjenja, tvrdeći da su razine ispod graničnih vrijednosti.
sections.content: Ana Tomas je nastavila s prezentacijom, ističući minimalan otisak projekta na tlo i njegovu lokaciju izvan naselja i zaštitnih zona. Detaljno je predstavila procjene utjecaja na okoliš. Karta buke, izrađena na temelju najgorih scenarija, pokazala je da su razine buke u svim naseljima značajno ispod graničnih vrijednosti. Slično je i sa studijom zasjenjenja. Prepoznat je utjecaj na faunu, posebno na ptice i šišmiše, s obzirom na blizinu Jadranskog migracijskog puta. Predviđene su mjere ublažavanja, poput izvođenja radova izvan sezone gniježđenja i postavljanja svjetala na gondolama. Utjecaji na floru, tlo, zrak i vodu također su identificirani, uz predložene mjere zaštite, uključujući plan upravljanja otpadom i sprječavanje incidenata s opasnim tvarima. Vizualni utjecaj nije procijenjen kao značajan, s obzirom na već izmijenjen krajobraz.

magisterium.assessment: Promicanje obnovljivih izvora energije doprinosi brizi za zajednički dom i održivom razvoju.
magisterium.enrichment: Integralna ekologija zahtijeva ravnotežu između energetskih potreba i zaštite lokalnog okoliša radi općeg dobra.

citations.document_title: To Directors and Employees of the "Terna" Group (31 August 2024) (Pope Francis),
Forming Consciences for Faithful Citizenship
citations.document_author: United States Conference of Catholic Bishops

magisterium.assessment_en: Promotion of renewable energy sources contributes to the care for the common home and sustainable development.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Integral ecology requires a balance between energy needs and the protection of the local environment for the common good.

sections.subtitle_en: Advantages of location and impact assessment: Noise, shading and fauna
sections.screenshot_description_en: Ana Tomas explains the results of the noise and shading study, claiming that the levels are below the limit values.
sections.content_en: Ana Tomas continued with the presentation, emphasizing the minimal footprint of the project on the ground and its location outside settlements and protected zones. She presented in detail the environmental impact assessments. The noise map, created based on worst-case scenarios, showed that noise levels in all settlements are significantly below limit values. It is similar with the shading study. An impact on fauna was recognized, especially on birds and bats, given the proximity of the Adriatic migration route. Mitigation measures were foreseen, such as performing works outside the nesting season and installing lights on gondolas. Impacts on flora, soil, air, and water were also identified, along with proposed protection measures, including a waste management plan and prevention of incidents with hazardous substances. The visual impact was not assessed as significant, given the already altered landscape.

sections.subtitle: Žestoke reakcije javnosti: 'Laži i demagogija' te 'predatori' vjetroparkova
sections.screenshot_description: Mještanin iz Iminova sela oštro kritizira prezentaciju, nazivajući je 'lažima i demagogijom'.
sections.content: Nakon prezentacije, uslijedile su oštre reakcije javnosti. Mještanin iz Iminova sela optužio je Anu Tomas za 'laži i demagogiju', pozivajući je da posjeti selo i osobno se uvjeri u buku postojećih vjetroelektrana. **Tadija Ljubić**, vijećnik Općinskog vijeća Tomislav Grada, nazvao je vjetroparkove 'predatorima' koji 'nestaše sve', kritizirajući nedostatak industrije i tvornica. Izrazio je snažno protivljenje projektu, ističući da lokalno stanovništvo ne želi takve investitore.

magisterium.assessment: Agresivna retorika i optužbe za demagogiju narušavaju dostojanstvo osoba i društveni dijalog.
magisterium.enrichment: Obmana je lišavanje ljudskog dostojanstva, a istinitost je temelj svake autentične ljudske komunikacije.

citations.document_title: To participants in the meeting organized by the Pontifical Council for Social Communications (May 23, 2008) (Pope Benedict XVI),
To the Pontifical Commission for Social Communications, 7 March 1985 - Speech (Pope John Paul II),

magisterium.assessment_en: Aggressive rhetoric and accusations of demagoguery undermine the dignity of persons and social dialogue.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Deception is the deprivation of human dignity, and truthfulness is the foundation of every authentic human communication.

sections.subtitle_en: Fierce public reactions: 'Lies and demagoguery' and 'predators' of wind farms
sections.screenshot_description_en: A local resident from Iminovo village sharply criticizes the presentation, calling it 'lies and demagoguery'.
sections.content_en: After the presentation, sharp reactions from the public followed. A local from Iminovo selo accused Ana Tomas of 'lies and demagoguery', inviting her to visit the village and personally see the noise of existing wind farms. **Tadija Ljubić**, a councilor of the Tomislav Grad Municipal Council, called wind farms 'predators' that 'destroy everything', criticizing the lack of industry and factories. He expressed strong opposition to the project, emphasizing that the local population does not want such investors.

sections.subtitle: Pravna valjanost koncesije: Sporna osnova i ustavne dileme
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana Čolčić postavlja pitanje pravne osnove koncesije, pozivajući se na neustavnost zakona i vremensku neusklađenost.
sections.content: **Andrijana Čolčić** je otvorila pitanje pravne valjanosti koncesije, ističući da je koncesijski ugovor potpisan 30. travnja 2008. godine, u vrijeme kada Zakon o koncesijama nije eksplicitno predviđao mogućnost davanja koncesija za vjetroparkove. Dodatno, pozvala se na presude Ustavnog suda (iz 2007. i 2024.) koje su proglasile kantonalni zakon o koncesijama neustavnim, s prestankom važenja 19. svibnja 2008. godine. Gđa Čolčić je zatražila od Ministarstva da obustavi postupak izdavanja ekoloških dozvola dok se ne razjasni pravni status koncesije.

magisterium.assessment: Pravna nesigurnost oko koncesije iz 2008. godine dovodi u pitanje pravednost i vladavinu prava.
magisterium.enrichment: Ugovori moraju biti moralno pravedni i sklopljeni u dobroj vjeri kako bi služili stabilnosti društva.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church
Decisiones seu Sententiae, Tomus CIX

magisterium.assessment_en: Legal uncertainty surrounding the 2008 concession calls into question fairness and the rule of law.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Contracts must be morally just and concluded in good faith in order to serve the stability of society.

sections.subtitle_en: Legal validity of the concession: Disputed basis and constitutional dilemmas
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana Čolčić raises the question of the legal basis of the concession, referring to the unconstitutionality of the law and temporal inconsistency.
sections.content_en: Andrijana Čolčić opened the question of the legal validity of the concession, pointing out that the concession agreement was signed on April 30, 2008, at a time when the Concessions Act did not explicitly foresee the possibility of granting concessions for wind farms. Additionally, she referred to the rulings of the Constitutional Court (from 2007 and 2024) which declared the cantonal law on concessions unconstitutional, with its validity ceasing on May 19, 2008. Ms. Čolčić requested from the Ministry to suspend the procedure for issuing environmental permits until the legal status of the concession is clarified.

sections.subtitle: Ministarstvo nije nadležno za tumačenje koncesijskih akata
sections.screenshot_description: Maja Bevanda objašnjava da Federalno Ministarstvo okoliša i turizma nije nadležno za tumačenje valjanosti koncesijskih ugovora.
sections.content: Odvjetnik investitora, **Tamar Močevic**, pojasnio je da je novi zakon o koncesijama iz 2026. godine riješio pravni vakuum, potvrđujući valjanost ugovora potpisanih prije 19. svibnja 2008. godine. Istaknuo je da konkretna koncesija za Vegradinu nije osporena sudskom presudom. Maja Bevanda iz Ministarstva je dodala da Ministarstvo nije nadležno niti kompetentno tumačiti valjanost akata koje su donijeli drugi organi. Njihova uloga je provjeriti dostavu svih potrebnih priloga, a ne dovoditi u pitanje legitimitet dokumenata s potpisom i pečatom drugih institucija.

magisterium.assessment: Zakonsko rješavanje pravnog vakuuma predstavlja nužan proceduralni korak prema pravnoj sigurnosti.
magisterium.enrichment: Institucije su dužne stvarati uvjete koji poboljšavaju ljudski život kroz pravedan pravni poredak.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church
Code of Canon Law

magisterium.assessment_en: Legal resolution of the legal vacuum represents a necessary procedural step towards legal certainty.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Institutions are obliged to create conditions which improve human life through a just legal order.

sections.subtitle_en: The Ministry is not competent for the interpretation of concession acts
sections.screenshot_description_en: Maja Bevanda explains that the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism is not competent for interpreting the validity of concession agreements.
sections.content_en: The investors' lawyer, **Tamar Močevic**, explained that the new concession law from 2026 resolved the legal vacuum, confirming the validity of contracts signed before May 19, 2008. He pointed out that the specific concession for Vegradina was not challenged by a court ruling. Maja Bevanda from the Ministry added that the Ministry is neither authorized nor competent to interpret the validity of acts issued by other bodies. Their role is to check the submission of all necessary attachments, and not to question the legitimacy of documents with the signature and seal of other institutions.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Diskrepanzija u snazi projekta: 100 MW vs. 136 MW
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana Čolčić ukazuje na razliku između deklarirane snage projekta (100 MW) i potencijalne snage turbina (136 MW).
sections.content: Andrijana Čolčić je ukazala na značajnu diskrepanciju u snazi projekta: dok se u dokumentima navodi 'do 100 MW', urbanistička suglasnost odnosi se na 17 turbina po 6.6 MW, a zahtjev za okolišnu procjenu na 17 turbina do 8 MW, što ukupno iznosi 136 MW. Maja Bevanda je pojasnila da Ministarstvo može odobriti samo snagu navedenu u zahtjevu investitora, odnosno do 100 MW. Predstavnik investitora, **Vlago Peha**, objasnio je da je ukupna snaga projekta ograničena na 100 MW. Fleksibilnost u pojedinačnoj snazi turbina (od 6.5 do 8 MW) proizlazi iz činjenice da konačni model vjetroturbine još nije definiran, što je, kako je naveo, uobičajena praksa u svijetu.

magisterium.assessment: Značajna diskrepancija u podacima o snazi postrojenja narušava načelo transparentnosti i istine.
magisterium.enrichment: Kultura transparentnosti i odgovornosti ključna je za pravedno upravljanje resursima i opće dobro.

sections.subtitle_en: Discrepancy in project power: 100 MW vs. 136 MW
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana Čolčić points to the difference between the declared power of the project (100 MW) and the potential power of the turbines (136 MW).
sections.content_en: Andrijana Čolčić pointed out a significant discrepancy in the project's power: while the documents state 'up to 100 MW', the urban planning consent refers to 17 turbines of 6.6 MW each, and the environmental assessment request refers to 17 turbines up to 8 MW, which totals 136 MW. Maja Bevanda clarified that the Ministry can only approve the power stated in the investor's request, i.e., up to 100 MW. The investor's representative, **Vlago Peha**, explained that the total power of the project is limited to 100 MW. The flexibility in the individual power of the turbines (from 6.5 to 8 MW) stems from the fact that the final wind turbine model has not yet been defined, which is, as he stated, a common practice worldwide.

sections.subtitle: Fleksibilnost u odabiru turbina: Investitor objašnjava strategiju
sections.screenshot_description: Vlago Peha, predstavnik investitora, objašnjava fleksibilnost u odabiru vjetroturbina, ističući da je ukupna snaga projekta fiksna, ali pojedinačna snaga turbina nije.
sections.content: Predstavnik investitora i voditelj projekta, Vlago Peha, pojasnio je prisutnima strategiju odabira vjetroturbina za projekt. Istaknuo je da je ukupna snaga vjetroelektrane ograničena na **100 megavata**, dok je pojedinačna snaga vjetroagregata fleksibilna i može ići do 8 megavata. Ova fleksibilnost proizlazi iz činjenice da konačan model vjetroturbine još nije definiran. Peha je naglasio da je takav pristup uobičajena praksa u industriji diljem svijeta, omogućujući prilagodbu najnovijim tehnološkim dostignućima i optimizaciju projekta. Dodao je da će se snaga pojedinih turbina naknadno ograničiti kako bi se uklopila u ukupnu dozvoljenu snagu od 100 megavata.

magisterium.assessment: Tehnička fleksibilnost investitora je prihvatljiva ako ostaje unutar okvira služenja zajednici.
magisterium.enrichment: Tehnološke inovacije moraju biti usmjerene na to da ljude učine humanijima, a ne samo na profit.

magisterium.assessment_en: Technical flexibility of the investor is acceptable if it remains within the framework of serving the community.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Technological innovations must be aimed at making people more humane, and not just at profit.

sections.subtitle_en: Flexibility in the selection of turbines: Investor explains the strategy
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vlago Peha, representative of the investor, explains the flexibility in the selection of wind turbines, emphasizing that the total power of the project is fixed, but the individual power of the turbines is not.
sections.content_en: The investor's representative and project manager, Vlago Peha, explained to those present the strategy for selecting wind turbines for the project. He pointed out that the total power of the wind farm is limited to **100 megawatts**, while the individual power of a wind turbine is flexible and can go up to 8 megawatts. This flexibility stems from the fact that the final wind turbine model has not yet been defined. Peha emphasized that such an approach is common practice in the industry worldwide, allowing for adaptation to the latest technological advancements and project optimization. He added that the power of individual turbines will be subsequently limited to fit within the total permitted power of 100 megawatts.

sections.subtitle: Ministarstvo poziva na fokus: Utjecaj na okoliš prioritet rasprave
sections.screenshot_description: Maja Bevanda iz Federalnog ministarstva okoliša i turizma apelira na sudionike da se drže teme utjecaja na okoliš, unatoč emotivnim raspravama o koncesijama.
sections.content: Maja Bevanda, voditeljica postupka iz Federalnog ministarstva okoliša i turizma, ponovno je apelirala na sudionike javne rasprave da se drže teme utjecaja projekta na okoliš. Naglasila je da pitanja vezana uz koncesije nisu predmet današnje rasprave, unatoč tome što su izazvala burne reakcije. Bevanda je istaknula da je Ministarstvo nadležno za procjenu utjecaja na okoliš i da se svi komentari i primjedbe trebaju usmjeriti na sastavnice okoliša poput zraka, tla, vode te zdravlja ljudi. Njezina intervencija uslijedila je nakon što su se rasprave počele udaljavati od ekoloških aspekata projekta.

magisterium.assessment: Fokus na okoliš promiče odgovorno upravljanje stvorenim i zaštitu zajedničkog doma.
concerns: Moguće zanemarivanje integralne ekologije koja uključuje ljudsku dimenziju
magisterium.enrichment: Briga za stvorenje kao moralna dužnost i odgovornost prema budućim generacijama.

sections.subtitle_en: Ministry calls for focus: Environmental impact priority of discussion
sections.screenshot_description_en: Maja Bevanda from the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism appeals to participants to stick to the topic of environmental impact, despite emotional discussions about concessions.
sections.content_en: Maja Bevanda, procedure manager from the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism, again appealed to the participants of the public discussion to stick to the topic of the project's impact on the environment. She emphasized that questions related to concessions are not the subject of today's discussion, despite having caused strong reactions. Bevanda pointed out that the Ministry is responsible for environmental impact assessment and that all comments and remarks should be directed to environmental components such as air, soil, water, and human health. Her intervention followed after the discussions began to deviate from the ecological aspects of the project.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Pitanja o javnoj raspravi iz 2008. i nedosljednosti u dokumentaciji
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana, predstavnica mjesne zajednice, iznosi nedosljednosti u broju turbina i snazi projekta kroz različite dokumente, tražeći objašnjenje.
sections.content: Predstavnica mjesne zajednice, Andrijana, postavila je ključna pitanja o javnoj raspravi održanoj 2008. godine i nedosljednostima u dokumentaciji projekta. Istaknula je da je prvotno rješenje iz 2008. godine predviđalo 57 vjetroturbina, dok se kasnije spominjalo 37, a sada 17 turbina. Posebno je naglasila da dokumentacija za Elektroprijenos BiH i dalje navodi snagu od 350 megavata, što je u očitom neskladu s trenutnim planom od 100 megavata. Odvjetnik investitora, Tamar Močević, priznao je da je riječ o grešci u registru i obećao ispravak na 100 megavata. Andrijana je zatražila službeni zapisnik javne rasprave iz 2008. godine, ističući da nitko od prisutnih mještana nije bio upoznat s njezinim sadržajem.

magisterium.assessment: Nedosljedna dokumentacija i upitna povijest rasprave narušavaju načelo istine i transparentnosti.
concerns: Povreda prava građana na istinito informiranje i aktivno sudjelovanje
magisterium.enrichment: Istina je temelj pravednog društvenog poretka i vjerodostojnih institucija.

citations.document_title: Speech to the Ambassador of Argentina (March 23, 1992)

magisterium.assessment_en: Inconsistent documentation and questionable history of discussion undermine the principle of truth and transparency.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Truth is the foundation of a just social order and credible institutions.
concerns_en: Violation of citizens' rights to truthful information and active participation

sections.subtitle_en: Questions about the public discussion from 2008 and inconsistencies in documentation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana, representative of the local community, points out inconsistencies in the number of turbines and the power of the project through various documents, seeking an explanation.
sections.content_en: The representative of the local community, Andrijana, raised key questions about the public discussion held in 2008 and inconsistencies in the project documentation. She pointed out that the initial solution from 2008 envisioned 57 wind turbines, while later 37 were mentioned, and now 17 turbines. She particularly emphasized that the documentation for Elektroprijenos BiH still states a power of 350 megawatts, which is in clear discrepancy with the current plan of 100 megawatts. The investor's lawyer, Tamar Močević, admitted that it was an error in the register and promised a correction to 100 megawatts. Andrijana requested the official minutes of the public discussion from 2008, pointing out that none of the present locals were familiar with its content.

sections.subtitle: Urbanistička suglasnost prije procjene utjecaja: Pravni izazovi projekta
sections.screenshot_description: Odvjetnik Tamar Močević i Maja Bevanda objašnjavaju situaciju s urbanističkom suglasnošću izdanom prije aktualne procjene utjecaja na okoliš, uz spomenute tužbe.
sections.content: Andrijana je izrazila zabrinutost zbog urbanističke suglasnosti za vjetropark Gradina, koja je izdana u listopadu 2022. godine, prije nego što je provedena aktualna procjena utjecaja na okoliš. Odvjetnik Tamar Močević potvrdio je da je suglasnost izdana na temelju prethodne procjene iz 2022. godine te je spomenuo da su podnesene dvije tužbe Kantonalnom sudu u Sarajevu protiv takve suglasnosti. Maja Bevanda iz Federalnog ministarstva okoliša i turizma pojasnila je da je trenutni postupak za *novi, izmijenjeni projekt* te da je investitoru naloženo da prođe novu proceduru zbog promjena u idejnom projektu, snazi i broju turbina. Naglasila je da je ovo prva stepenica koju investitor mora proći prije dobivanja urbanističke i građevinske dozvole za novu konfiguraciju projekta.

magisterium.assessment: Izdavanje dozvola prije ključnih procjena predstavlja ozbiljno odstupanje od vladavine prava.
concerns: Pravna nesigurnost i instrumentalizacija administrativnih procesa
magisterium.enrichment: Pravednost zahtijeva da se zakoni provode u službi općeg dobra, a ne partikularnih interesa.

citations.document_title: The Coherence of the Four Basic Principles of Catholic Social Doctrine

magisterium.assessment_en: Issuing permits before key assessments represents a serious deviation from the rule of law.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Justice demands that laws be enforced in the service of the common good, and not particular interests.
concerns_en: Legal uncertainty and instrumentalization of administrative processes

sections.subtitle_en: Urban planning consent before impact assessment: Legal challenges of the project
sections.screenshot_description_en: Lawyer Tamar Močević and Maja Bevanda explain the situation with the urban consent issued before the current environmental impact assessment, along with the mentioned lawsuits.
sections.content_en: Andrijana expressed concern regarding the urban planning consent for the Gradina wind farm, which was issued in October 2022, before the current environmental impact assessment was conducted. Lawyer Tamar Močević confirmed that the consent was issued based on a previous assessment from 2022 and mentioned that two lawsuits were filed with the Cantonal Court in Sarajevo against such consent. Maja Bevanda from the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism clarified that the current procedure is for a *new, modified project* and that the investor was ordered to undergo a new procedure due to changes in the conceptual design, power, and number of turbines. She emphasized that this is the first step the investor must complete before obtaining urban planning and building permits for the new project configuration.

sections.subtitle: Softverske simulacije i problematične koordinate: Upitna valjanost mjerenja
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana propituje pouzdanost softverskih simulacija buke i zasjenjenja, ističući da su koordinate turbina u dokumentaciji investitora nedosljedne.
sections.content: Andrijana je detaljno propitala valjanost softverskih simulacija korištenih za procjenu utjecaja vjetra, buke i zasjenjenja. Izrazila je sumnju u primjenjivost takvih simulacija na stvarne ljude i okoliš, posebno nakon što je investitor priznao da su u dokumentaciji navedene proturječne koordinate. Ana Tomas iz Zagreb Inspecta objasnila je da se softverske simulacije (poput onih u WindFarmeru) temelje na podacima o snazi, visini i promjeru rotora turbina, uzimajući u obzir 'najgore scenarije'. Međutim, Andrijana je istaknula da je investitor priznao postojanje dviju različitih skupina koordinata, što dovodi u pitanje pouzdanost svih mjerenja. Dodatno, Andrijana je upozorila na turbinu 1/8 u katastarskoj općini Gornji Brišnik, koja je navedena na parceli gdje već postoji turbina vjetroparka Mesihovina, tražeći objašnjenje za ovaj očiti propust.

magisterium.assessment: Upitna valjanost tehničkih simulacija ugrožava sigurnost i dobrobit lokalnog stanovništva.
concerns: Rizik po zdravlje mještana zbog nepouzdanih mjerenja buke i zasjenjenja
magisterium.enrichment: Tehnička stručnost mora biti u službi ljudskog dostojanstva i integriteta osobe.

magisterium.enrichment_en: Technical expertise must be in the service of human dignity and the integrity of the person.

sections.subtitle_en: Software simulations and problematic coordinates: Questionable validity of measurements
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana questions the reliability of software simulations of noise and shadowing, pointing out that the coordinates of the turbines in the investor's documentation are inconsistent.
sections.content_en: Andrijana thoroughly questioned the validity of software simulations used for assessing the impact of wind, noise, and shadowing. She expressed doubt about the applicability of such simulations to real people and the environment, especially after the investor admitted that contradictory coordinates were stated in the documentation. Ana Tomas from Zagreb Inspecta explained that software simulations (like those in WindFarmer) are based on data about the power, height, and rotor diameter of turbines, taking into account 'worst-case scenarios'. However, Andrijana pointed out that the investor admitted the existence of two different sets of coordinates, which calls into question the reliability of all measurements. Additionally, Andrijana warned about turbine 1/8 in the cadastral municipality of Gornji Brišnik, which is listed on a plot where a turbine of the Mesihovina wind farm already exists, requesting an explanation for this obvious oversight.

sections.subtitle: Trafostanica na privatnom zemljištu i vizualni utjecaj: Zabrinutost mještana
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana izražava zabrinutost zbog planirane trafostanice na privatnom zemljištu, ističući vizualni utjecaj i nedostatak detalja o tehničkom rješenju.
sections.content: Pitanje lokacije trafostanice izazvalo je značajnu zabrinutost među mještanima. Andrijana je istaknula da je trafostanica planirana na katastarskoj čestici 2340, koja se naslanja na privatno zemljište njezine obitelji i drugih mještana u Omerovićima. Posebno je naglasila vizualni utjecaj, pitajući hoće li se teren nasipati ili iskopavati kako bi se dobio plato za trafostanicu. Upozorila je da bi nasipanje stvorilo 'stršeći tampon' na brdu, dok bi iskopavanje rezultiralo 'još jednim kamenolomom'. Vlago Peha, predstavnik investitora, izjavio je da će tehničko rješenje definirati projektanti u kasnijim fazama projekta. Odvjetnik Tamar Močević dodao je da će vlasnici susjednih parcela imati status zainteresiranih strana u postupku glavnog projekta, što će im omogućiti uvid u detaljne planove.

magisterium.assessment: Zadiranje u privatno vlasništvo bez suglasnosti zahtijeva primjenu načela subsidijarnosti.
concerns: Narušavanje kvalitete života i vizualnog identiteta lokalne zajednice
magisterium.enrichment: Subsidijarnost nalaže uvažavanje lokalnih institucija i prava obitelji te mještana.

sections.subtitle_en: Transformer station on private land and visual impact: Concerns of residents
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana expresses concern due to the planned substation on private land, highlighting the visual impact and the lack of details about the technical solution.
sections.content_en: The question of the substation's location caused significant concern among residents. Andrijana pointed out that the substation is planned on cadastral parcel 2340, which abuts the private land of her family and other residents in Omerovići. She particularly emphasized the visual impact, asking whether the terrain would be filled or excavated to create a plateau for the substation. She warned that filling would create a 'protruding buffer' on the hill, while excavation would result in 'yet another quarry'. Vlago Peha, the investor's representative, stated that the technical solution would be defined by the designers in later stages of the project. Lawyer Tamar Močević added that owners of neighboring parcels would have the status of interested parties in the main project procedure, which would allow them insight into the detailed plans.

sections.subtitle: Nezakonite koncesije i prevareni mještani: Zahtjev za kumulativnu procjenu
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana naglašava problem privatnih parcela unutar koncesijskog polja i upozorava na nepodnošljivu buku postojećih vjetroparkova, tražeći kumulativnu procjenu utjecaja.
sections.content: Andrijana je oštro kritizirala pravnu valjanost koncesije, ističući da se unutar koncesijskog polja nalazi više od stotinu privatnih parcela u katastarskim općinama Stipanjići, Kovači, Omerovići, Cebara, Brišnik, Mrkodol i Roško Polje, što koncesiju čini nezakonitom. Upozorila je na loša iskustva mještana s postojećim vjetroparkovima Mesihovina i Jelovača, gdje su obećanja o tišini prekršena, a ljudi sada žive s nepodnošljivom bukom. Zbog preklapanja koncesijskih polja i kumulativnih efekata, Andrijana je izričito zatražila izradu **kumulativne procjene utjecaja na okoliš** za sve vjetroparkove (Gradina, Mesihovina, Oštrc) zajedno, umjesto da se svaki projekt tretira zasebno. Ana Tomas je odgovorila da je kumulativni utjecaj već obuhvaćen u preliminarnoj procjeni, s preporukama za monitoring ptica, šišmiša, buke i bioraznolikosti, ali je Andrijana inzistirala na punoj studiji po ESI standardima.

magisterium.assessment: Nezakonite koncesije i prijevara mještana izravno proturječe kršćanskoj pravednosti i dostojanstvu.
concerns: Teška eksploatacija privatnih osoba i sustavno kršenje prava vlasništva
magisterium.enrichment: Osoba nikada ne smije biti svedena na sredstvo za postizanje profita ili resurs.

sections.subtitle_en: Illegal concessions and deceived locals: Request for cumulative assessment
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana emphasizes the problem of private plots within the concession field and warns of the unbearable noise of existing wind farms, seeking a cumulative impact assessment.
sections.content_en: Andrijana sharply criticized the legal validity of the concession, pointing out that within the concession area there are more than one hundred private plots in the cadastral municipalities of Stipanjići, Kovači, Omerovići, Cebara, Brišnik, Mrkodol and Roško Polje, which makes the concession illegal. She warned of the bad experiences of local residents with the existing wind farms Mesihovina and Jelovača, where promises of silence were broken, and people now live with unbearable noise. Due to the overlapping concession areas and cumulative effects, Andrijana explicitly requested the preparation of a **cumulative environmental impact assessment** for all wind farms (Gradina, Mesihovina, Oštrc) together, instead of each project being treated separately. Ana Tomas replied that the cumulative impact was already covered in the preliminary assessment, with recommendations for monitoring birds, bats, noise, and biodiversity, but Andrijana insisted on a full study according to ESI standards.

sections.subtitle: Kuće unutar 500 metara i turbine od 8 MW: Eksperiment na ljudima?
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana postavlja pitanje o udaljenosti turbina od kuća, navodeći da su kuće unutar 500 metara od koncesijske linije i da turbine od 8 MW predstavljaju eksperiment na ljudima.
sections.content: Andrijana je upozorila na geodetski izračun koji pokazuje da se kuće u četiri sela nalaze unutar 500 metara od koncesijske linije, što je podatak koji je Ministarstvu dostavljen još u studenom. Postavila je pitanje o postojanju vjetroturbina snage 8 megavata na kopnu u Europi, udaljenih manje od dva kilometra od kuća. Vlago Peha, predstavnik investitora, izjavio je da nema tu informaciju. Andrijana je naglasila da su turbine takve snage novost, predstavljene tek krajem 2024. godine u Frankfurtu, te da bi njihova instalacija na tako maloj udaljenosti od naselja predstavljala 'eksperiment na ljudima'. Zatražila je da se ova iznimno važna stavka zabilježi u zapisnik.

magisterium.assessment: Postavljanje turbina od 8 MW na 500 m od kuća bez jasnih dokaza o sigurnosti narušava dostojanstvo i zdravlje obitelji.
magisterium.enrichment: Čovjek je cilj, a ne sredstvo; socijalni nauk zahtijeva zaštitu najranjivijih, osobito djece, od tehnoloških eksperimenata.

citations.document_title: 54th World Day of Peace 2021 - A Culture of Care as a Path to Peace
To participants in the meeting of the Executive Council of Unicef (April 26, 1984) (Pope John Paul II),

magisterium.assessment_en: Installation of 8 MW turbines at 500 m from houses without clear evidence of safety violates the dignity and health of families.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Man is the end, not the means; social teaching demands the protection of the most vulnerable, especially children, from technological experiments.
concerns_en: Violation of the right to a safe home

sections.subtitle_en: Houses within 500 meters and 8 MW turbines: Experiment on people?
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana asks a question about the distance of turbines from houses, stating that the houses are within 500 meters of the concession line and that 8 MW turbines represent an experiment on people.
sections.content_en: Andrijana warned about a geodetic calculation which shows that houses in four villages are located within 500 meters of the concession line, which is information that was delivered to the Ministry already in November. She asked a question about the existence of 8-megawatt wind turbines on land in Europe, located less than two kilometers from houses. Vlago Peha, the investor's representative, stated that he does not have that information. Andrijana emphasized that turbines of such power are a novelty, presented only at the end of 2024 in Frankfurt, and that their installation at such a small distance from settlements would represent 'an experiment on people'. She requested that this exceptionally important item be recorded in the minutes.

sections.subtitle: Ponor Kovači i krški teren: Zabrinutost zbog miniranja i temelja
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana izražava duboku zabrinutost zbog miniranja na krškom terenu u blizini Ponora Kovači, ističući potencijalne rizike za podzemne vode i Buško jezero.
sections.content: Posebna zabrinutost izražena je zbog Ponora Kovači, ključnog ponora na krškom terenu koji odvodi vodu s Duvanjskog polja u Buško jezero. Andrijana je istaknula da ponor ima ograničen kapacitet i povijest začepljenja, što je dovodilo do plavljenja polja. S obzirom na to da se najbliža turbina nalazi manje od 600 metara od ponora, postavila je pitanje o količini betona i željeza potrebnog za temelje turbina te o načinu miniranja u tako osjetljivom krškom području. Odvjetnik Tamar Močević odgovorio je da će detalji o temeljima i opremi biti definirani u glavnom projektu, a ne u idejnom projektu, te da se u ovoj fazi ne specificira oprema. Andrijana je kritizirala apsurdnost zakona koji dopušta Ministarstvu da daje suglasnost na projekt za koji investitor tvrdi da ne zna ključne detalje, naglašavajući da je krški teren s podzemnim kanalima iznimno osjetljiv na miniranje i građevinske radove.

magisterium.assessment: Rizik za krški ekosustav i pitku vodu (Buško jezero) ukazuje na nedostatak poštovanja prema integritetu stvorenja.
magisterium.enrichment: Stvoreni svijet ima intrinzičnu vrijednost; upravljanje resursima ne smije biti odvojeno od moralnih imperativa i brige za ekosustave.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church
Laudato Si

magisterium.assessment_en: Risk for the karst ecosystem and drinking water (Buško Lake) indicates a lack of respect for the integrity of creation.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The created world has intrinsic value; the management of resources must not be separated from moral imperatives and care for ecosystems.

sections.subtitle_en: Kovači Sinkhole and Karst Terrain: Concern due to Blasting and Foundations
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana expresses deep concern due to blasting on karst terrain near Ponor Kovači, highlighting potential risks for groundwater and Buško Lake.
sections.content_en: Special concern was expressed due to Ponora Kovači, a key sinkhole in the karst terrain that drains water from Duvanjsko polje into Buško jezero. Andrijana pointed out that the sinkhole has a limited capacity and a history of blockages, which led to the flooding of the field. Given that the nearest turbine is located less than 600 meters from the sinkhole, she raised a question about the amount of concrete and iron needed for the turbine foundations and about the method of blasting in such a sensitive karst area. Lawyer Tamar Močević replied that details about the foundations and equipment will be defined in the main project, and not in the conceptual project, and that equipment is not specified at this stage. Andrijana criticized the absurdity of the law that allows the Ministry to give consent to a project for which the investor claims not to know key details, emphasizing that karst terrain with underground channels is extremely sensitive to blasting and construction works.

iterations.theme_en: Detailed questions about technical aspects, legal validity, and impact on karst terrain

iterations.theme: Utjecaj na ljude, udaljenost od naselja i prve emotivne reakcije mještana

sections.subtitle: Uloga prethodne procjene: Prepoznavanje i ublažavanje negativnih utjecaja
sections.screenshot_description: Maja Bevanda objašnjava svrhu prethodne procjene utjecaja na okoliš.
sections.content: Maja Bevanda iz Federalnog Ministarstva okoliša i turizma pojašnjava da je svrha prethodne procjene prepoznavanje potencijalnih negativnih utjecaja projekta na okoliš, uključujući tlo, vodu i podzemne vode. Cilj je, kako navodi, pružiti povratnu informaciju investitoru kako bi se ti utjecaji smanjili na najmanju moguću mjeru ili u potpunosti eliminirali. Primjerice, ako se neka turbina nalazi na nepovoljnoj lokaciji, Ministarstvo bi investitoru preporučilo izmještanje turbine ili odustajanje od te konkretne lokacije. Naglašava da je to ključna funkcija procjene – identificirati probleme i predložiti mjere za njihovo rješavanje.

magisterium.assessment: Prethodna procjena Ministarstva je nužan proceduralni korak koji teži prepoznavanju utjecaja na zajedničko dobro.
magisterium.enrichment: Načelo supsidijarnosti i sudjelovanja nalaže da institucije osiguraju transparentnost i zaštitu lokalne zajednice.

citations.document_title: Laudato Si
Forming Consciences for Faithful Citizenship
citations.document_author: United States Conference of Catholic Bishops

magisterium.assessment_en: The prior assessment of the Ministry is a necessary procedural step which aims at recognizing the impact on the common good.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The principle of subsidiarity and participation requires that institutions ensure transparency and protection of the local community.

sections.subtitle_en: Role of preliminary assessment: Recognition and mitigation of negative impacts
sections.screenshot_description_en: Maja Bevanda explains the purpose of the preliminary environmental impact assessment.
sections.content_en: Maja Bevanda from the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism explains that the purpose of the preliminary assessment is to identify potential negative impacts of the project on the environment, including soil, water, and groundwater. The goal is, as she states, to provide feedback to the investor so that these impacts are reduced to the lowest possible measure or completely eliminated. For example, if a turbine is located in an unfavorable location, the Ministry would recommend to the investor relocating the turbine or abandoning that specific location. She emphasizes that this is the key function of the assessment – to identify problems and propose measures for their resolution.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Sporna udaljenost turbina od naselja: Zakonske praznine i preporuke
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana Ćaleta postavlja pitanje o udaljenosti turbina od kuća, dok Ana Tomas i Maja Bevanda odgovaraju.
sections.content: Andrijana Ćaleta postavlja ključno pitanje o udaljenosti turbina od stambenih objekata, ističući da se kuće nalaze unutar 500 metara od koncesijske linije. Maja Bevanda priznaje da zakonodavstvo u Bosni i Hercegovini ne propisuje konkretnu minimalnu udaljenost vjetroelektrana od kuća, već samo općenito navodi da ne smije biti negativnog utjecaja. Ana Tomas, predstavnica firme Zagreb Inspect, spominje preporučenu formulu za udaljenost: visina turbine s podignutom lopaticom pomnožena s 1.5. U konkretnom slučaju, s visinom tornja od 150 metara i polumjerom rotora od 97.5 metara, ukupna visina iznosi 247.5 metara, što bi po toj formuli dalo preporučenu udaljenost od 371 metar. Andrijana Ćaleta kritizira ovu situaciju, pitajući hoće li se izmještati turbine ili kuće, te ističe da u Europi ne postoji zemlja koja bi dopustila postavljanje turbina takve snage na tako maloj udaljenosti.

magisterium.assessment: Korištenje zakonskih praznina za smanjenje udaljenosti od naselja proturječi načelu solidarnosti i brizi za bližnjega.
magisterium.enrichment: Pravednost zahtijeva da zakoni štite prava osoba, a ne samo interese kapitala, promičući mir kroz pravedne odnose.

citations.document_title: Forming Consciences for Faithful Citizenship
citations.document_author: United States Conference of Catholic Bishops

citations.document_title: Letter to the Secretary General of the International Conference on Population and Development (March 18, 1994)

magisterium.assessment_en: Using legal loopholes to reduce the distance from settlements contradicts the principle of solidarity and care for one's neighbor.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Justice demands that laws protect the rights of persons, and not only the interests of capital, promoting peace through just relations.

sections.subtitle_en: Controversial distance of turbines from settlements: Legal gaps and recommendations
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana Ćaleta asks a question about the distance of turbines from houses, while Ana Tomas and Maja Bevanda answer.
sections.content_en: Andrijana Ćaleta poses a key question about the distance of turbines from residential buildings, pointing out that houses are located within 500 meters of the concession line. Maja Bevanda admits that legislation in Bosnia and Herzegovina does not prescribe a specific minimum distance of wind farms from houses, but only generally states that there must be no negative impact. Ana Tomas, a representative of the company Zagreb Inspect, mentions a recommended formula for distance: turbine height with a raised blade multiplied by 1.5. In this specific case, with a tower height of 150 meters and a rotor radius of 97.5 meters, the total height is 247.5 meters, which according to that formula would give a recommended distance of 371 meters. Andrijana Ćaleta criticizes this situation, asking whether the turbines or the houses will be relocated, and points out that in Europe there is no country that would allow the installation of turbines of such power at such a small distance.

sections.subtitle: Kontrolirano miniranje u krškom području: Strahovi i stručna objašnjenja
sections.screenshot_description: Stručnjakinja objašnjava proces kontroliranog miniranja u kršu.
sections.content: S obzirom na krški teren i prisutnost ponora, Ana Tomas objašnjava da su ponori prepoznati u studiji i da se miniranje mora provoditi uz **geološko-geotehnički nadzor**. Dodatno, stručnjakinja Ivana detaljnije pojašnjava metodu **kontroliranog miniranja**, koja je razvijena specifično za krška područja. Ova metoda uključuje korištenje guste mreže mikro pukotina koje se pune malim dozama eksploziva, čime se izbjegavaju snažne detonacije i urušavanja. Cilj je samo lokalno raspucavanje stijene radi lakšeg iskopa, uz stalni nadzor stručnjaka koji obustavljaju radove ako se pojave šupljine. Unatoč ovim objašnjenjima, mještani izražavaju strah od mogućeg oštećenja podzemnih kanala i ponora, što bi moglo dovesti do katastrofalnih posljedica poput poplava.

magisterium.assessment: Stručni nadzor miniranja je tehnički ispravan, ali mora uvažiti strahove mještana kao legitimne subjekte dijaloga.
magisterium.enrichment: Tehnička rješenja nisu dovoljna ako zanemaruju ljudsku dimenziju i kulturni kontekst lokalne zajednice.

citations.document_title: Laudato Si
54th World Day of Peace 2021 - A Culture of Care as a Path to Peace

magisterium.assessment_en: Expert supervision of blasting is technically sound, but must respect the fears of the locals as legitimate subjects of dialogue.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Technical solutions are not enough if they neglect the human dimension and the cultural context of the local community.

sections.subtitle_en: Controlled blasting in the karst area: Fears and expert explanations
sections.screenshot_description_en: The expert explains the process of controlled blasting in karst.
sections.content_en: Given the karst terrain and the presence of sinkholes, Ana Tomas explains that the sinkholes have been identified in the study and that blasting must be carried out with **geological-geotechnical supervision**. Additionally, expert Ivana explains in more detail the method of **controlled blasting**, which was developed specifically for karst areas. This method involves the use of a dense network of micro-fissures that are filled with small doses of explosives, thereby avoiding strong detonations and collapses. The goal is only local fracturing of the rock for easier excavation, with constant supervision by experts who halt works if cavities appear. Despite these explanations, residents express fear of possible damage to underground channels and sinkholes, which could lead to catastrophic consequences such as floods.

sections.subtitle: Vizualni utjecaj vjetroparkova: 'Vidljivi s Mjeseca'
sections.screenshot_description: Mještanin emotivno opisuje vizualni utjecaj vjetroturbina.
sections.content: Jedan od mještana emotivno izražava zabrinutost zbog vizualnog utjecaja vjetroparkova. S ironijom primjećuje da će područje biti toliko izmijenjeno da će 'biti vidljivo s Mjeseca', uspoređujući ga s Kineskim zidom. Ova izjava naglašava duboku zabrinutost lokalnog stanovništva zbog trajne promjene krajobraza i gubitka prirodnog izgleda njihovog okruženja, što smatraju neprihvatljivim.

magisterium.assessment: Narušavanje vizualnog identiteta krajolika bez pristanka mještana predstavlja oblik kulturne i ekološke degradacije.
magisterium.enrichment: Briga za zajednički dom uključuje očuvanje ljepote i kulturnog nasljeđa koje oblikuje identitet naroda.

citations.document_title: Laudato Si
Laudato Si

magisterium.assessment_en: Violation of the visual identity of the landscape without the consent of local residents represents a form of cultural and ecological degradation.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Care for the common home includes the preservation of beauty and cultural heritage which shapes the identity of the people.
concerns_en: Disruption of the harmony of the created world

sections.subtitle_en: Visual impact of wind farms: 'Visible from the Moon'
sections.screenshot_description_en: A local resident emotionally describes the visual impact of wind turbines.
sections.content_en: One of the locals emotionally expresses concern due to the visual impact of wind farms. He ironically notes that the area will be so altered that it will 'be visible from the Moon', comparing it to the Great Wall of China. This statement emphasizes the deep concern of the local population due to the permanent change of the landscape and the loss of the natural appearance of their environment, which they consider unacceptable.

sections.subtitle: Vlada HBŽ-a odbija propisati udaljenost turbina: Nezainteresiranost za narod
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana Ćaleta kritizira Vladu HBŽ-a zbog odbijanja propisivanja udaljenosti turbina.
sections.content: Andrijana Ćaleta oštro kritizira Vladu Herceg Bosanske županije zbog odbijanja da propiše minimalnu udaljenost vjetroturbina od kuća. Ističe da su građani mjesecima tražili takav propis, koji je u nadležnosti Vlade, ali je njihov zahtjev odbijen. Andrijana zaključuje da ovakav potez pokazuje potpunu nezainteresiranost Vlade za dobrobit vlastitog naroda, ostavljajući stanovništvo nezaštićenim pred potencijalnim negativnim utjecajima vjetroelektrana.

magisterium.assessment: Odbijanje dijaloga i propisivanja zaštitnih mjera izravno proturječi načelu supsidijarnosti i obvezi vlasti da služi općem dobru.
magisterium.enrichment: Vlast ima moralnu obvezu poticati sudjelovanje građana i osigurati uvjete za dostojan život svih članova zajednice.

citations.document_title: Compendium of the Social Doctrine of the Church
citations.document_author: Pontifical Council for Justice and Peace

citations.document_title: Forming Consciences for Faithful Citizenship
citations.document_author: United States Conference of Catholic Bishops

magisterium.assessment_en: Rejection of dialogue and prescribing protective measures directly contradicts the principle of subsidiarity and the obligation of authorities to serve the common good.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Authority has a moral obligation to encourage the participation of citizens and to ensure conditions for a dignified life of all members of the community.
concerns_en: Lack of hearing for vulnerable groups

sections.subtitle_en: HBŽ-a Government refuses to prescribe the distance of turbines: Disinterest for the people
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana Ćaleta criticizes the Government of HBŽ due to the refusal of prescribing the distance of turbines.
sections.content_en: Andrijana Ćaleta sharply criticizes the Government of Herceg Bosanska County due to its refusal to prescribe a minimum distance of wind turbines from houses. She points out that citizens had been requesting such a regulation for months, which is under the Government's jurisdiction, but their request was rejected. Andrijana concludes that such a move shows the Government's complete disinterest in the well-being of its own people, leaving the population unprotected from the potential negative impacts of wind farms.

sections.subtitle: Zona vrtloženja i sigurnosne udaljenosti: Zahtjevi mještana
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana Ćaleta objašnjava koncept zone vrtloženja i uspoređuje ga s europskim standardima.
sections.content: Andrijana Ćaleta nastavlja s argumentima o sigurnosnim udaljenostima, navodeći primjer Danske gdje je minimalna udaljenost turbine od naselja deset puta veća od visine turbine. Prema toj logici, za turbine visoke 245 metara, minimalna udaljenost bi trebala biti 2.45 kilometara. Posebno naglašava **zonu vrtloženja (swept area)**, koja je prema tvorničkim specifikacijama turbina navedenih u dokumentaciji 2.960 četvornih metara. Andrijana traži da se ta zona uzme kao minimalna udaljenost od kuća, ističući da mještani ne bi trebali živjeti u zoni vrtloženja. Smatra to minimumom ljudskog odnosa prema stanovništvu, s obzirom na to da je 'svako polje oko naše općine predviđeno za turbine'.

magisterium.assessment: Ignoriranje provjerenih sigurnosnih standarda (poput danskog modela) predstavlja odstupanje od dužne pažnje prema zdravlju građana.
magisterium.enrichment: Tjelesno zdravlje je dragocjen dar koji društvo mora štititi osiguravanjem prikladnih životnih uvjeta.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church

magisterium.assessment_en: Ignoring proven safety standards (like the Danish model) represents a deviation from due care towards the health of citizens.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Physical health is a precious gift which society must protect by ensuring appropriate living conditions.

sections.subtitle_en: Vortex zone and safety distances: Requirements of residents
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana Ćaleta explains the concept of the vortex zone and compares it with European standards.
sections.content_en: Andrijana Ćaleta continues with arguments about safety distances, citing the example of Denmark where the minimum distance of a turbine from settlements is ten times greater than the height of the turbine. According to that logic, for turbines 245 meters high, the minimum distance should be 2.45 kilometers. She particularly emphasizes the **vortex zone (swept area)**, which according to the factory specifications of the turbines mentioned in the documentation is 2,960 square meters. Andrijana requests that this zone be taken as the minimum distance from houses, pointing out that locals should not live in the vortex zone. She considers this the minimum of human relations towards the population, given that 'every field around our municipality is designated for turbines'.

sections.subtitle: Škole u zoni zasjenjenja: Rizik za djecu s posebnim potrebama
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana Ćaleta upozorava na blizinu škola vjetroturbinama i rizik od zasjenjenja.
sections.content: Andrijana Ćaleta iznosi alarmantne podatke o blizini škola planiranim turbinama. Upozorava da se na 550 metara od jedne turbine u Kovačima nalazi **škola za djecu s posebnim potrebama**, a na otprilike 700 metara od druge turbine nalazi se **osnovna škola u Brišniku**. Iako studija zasjenjenja nije zakonski obvezna u BiH, Andrijana ističe da je u europskoj regulativi zasjenjenje prepoznato kao ozbiljan problem koji se mora strogo kontrolirati. Znanstveno je dokazano da zasjenjenje može izazvati **epileptične napade** kod osjetljivih osoba, što predstavlja značajan rizik za djecu u spomenutim školama. Naglašava da su obje škole izravno u zoni zasjenjenja i vrtloženja turbina, zajedno s brojnim obiteljskim kućama.
keywords: škola za djecu s posebnim potrebama

magisterium.assessment: Postavljanje turbina blizu škole za djecu s teškoćama teško krši prioritetnu skrb za najranjivije članove društva.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva zahtijeva posebnu zaštitu djece, osobito onih koji se ne mogu sami braniti, kao mjerilo pravednosti društva.

citations.document_title: To participants in the meeting of the Executive Council of Unicef (April 26, 1984) (Pope John Paul II),
Acta Apostolicae Sedis: Issue 12, December, 2008

magisterium.assessment_en: The placement of turbines near a school for children with disabilities severely violates priority care for the most vulnerable members of society.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church demands special protection of children, especially those who cannot defend themselves, as a measure of society's justice.
concerns_en: Violation of the right to safe education

sections.subtitle_en: Schools in the shadow zone: Risk for children with special needs
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana Ćaleta warns about the proximity of schools to wind turbines and the risk of shadowing.
sections.content_en: Andrijana Ćaleta presents alarming data about the proximity of schools to planned turbines. She warns that at 550 meters from one turbine in Kovači there is a **school for children with special needs**, and at approximately 700 meters from another turbine there is an **elementary school in Brišnik**. Although a shadow flicker study is not legally mandatory in BiH, Andrijana points out that in European regulations, shadow flicker is recognized as a serious problem that must be strictly controlled. It has been scientifically proven that shadow flicker can cause **epileptic seizures** in sensitive individuals, which poses a significant risk to children in the mentioned schools. She emphasizes that both schools are directly in the zone of shadow flicker and turbine turbulence, along with numerous family homes.
keywords_en: school for children with special needs

sections.subtitle: Virtualna mjerenja zasjenjenja: Nedostatak stvarnih podataka
sections.screenshot_description: Ana Tomas objašnjava kako je rađena studija zasjenjenja pomoću softvera.
sections.content: Ana Tomas objašnjava da je studija zasjenjenja rađena softverski, postavljanjem 'receptora' na najbližim naseljima poput Donjeg Brišnika, Cebare, Omerovića, Kovača i Tubolje. Tvrdi da je modeliranje provedeno prema 'najgorem scenariju' i da softver može predvidjeti datume i vremena kada se zasjenjenje može očekivati. Ističe da se zasjenjenje ne može mjeriti na terenu, već isključivo softverski, što je 'priznati način' mjerenja. Međutim, Andrijana Ćaleta kritizira ovu metodu, naglašavajući da se mjerenja nisu vršila na stvarnom terenu, već virtualnom simulacijom, što dovodi u pitanje vjerodostojnost rezultata.

magisterium.assessment: Oslanjanje isključivo na softverske modele bez terenske provjere je proceduralno, ali nedovoljno za integralnu zaštitu osoba.
magisterium.enrichment: Ekološki programi moraju poštovati dostojanstvo stvarnih ljudi i njihovih obitelji, a ne samo apstraktne podatke.

citations.document_title: To the members of the Agency of the United Nations, 18 August 1985

magisterium.assessment_en: Reliance exclusively on software models without field verification is procedural, but insufficient for integral protection of persons.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Ecological programs must respect the dignity of real people and their families, and not just abstract data.

sections.subtitle_en: Virtual shadowing measurements: Lack of real data
sections.screenshot_description_en: Ana Tomas explains how the shading study was done using software.
sections.content_en: Ana Tomas explains that the shading study was done by software, by placing 'receptors' in the nearest settlements such as Donji Brišnik, Cebara, Omerovići, Kovač, and Tubolja. She claims that the modeling was conducted according to the 'worst-case scenario' and that the software can predict dates and times when shading can be expected. She points out that shading cannot be measured on the ground, but exclusively by software, which is a 'recognized method' of measurement. However, Andrijana Ćaleta criticizes this method, emphasizing that the measurements were not performed on actual terrain, but by virtual simulation, which calls into question the credibility of the results.

sections.subtitle: Zahtjev za stvarna mjerenja: Kritika neobveznosti EU direktiva
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana Ćaleta traži stvarna mjerenja zasjenjenja, a ne virtualne simulacije.
sections.content: Andrijana Ćaleta izražava nezadovoljstvo stavom da europske direktive o zasjenjenju nisu obvezne, već samo smjernice. Naglašava da europske direktive jasno propisuju kako se mjerenja trebaju provoditi, uključujući postavljanje stupova određene visine i mjerenja u periodu od jedne do tri godine, a ne virtualnim simulacijama. Ističe da mještani ne žele 'vjerovati' u rezultate softverskih simulacija, već traže **egzaktna mjerenja** kako bi se utvrdio stvarni utjecaj. Ivana, stručnjakinja, pokušava umanjiti problem navodeći da se zasjenjenje javlja samo mjesec dana godišnje, u večernjim satima, što Andrijana smatra nedovoljnim objašnjenjem za ozbiljnost problema.

magisterium.assessment: Odbijanje stvarnih mjerenja uz opravdanje neobvezujućim smjernicama EU pokazuje manjak odgovornosti prema zajedničkom dobru.
magisterium.enrichment: Upravljanje stvorenim svijetom ne smije biti vođeno kratkovidnošću ili sebičnim interesima, već dobrom cijele ljudske obitelji.

citations.document_title: To the members of the Agency of the United Nations, 18 August 1985

magisterium.assessment_en: Rejection of actual measurements with the justification of non-binding EU guidelines shows a lack of responsibility towards the common good.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Management of the created world must not be guided by shortsightedness or selfish interests, but by the good of the entire human family.

sections.subtitle_en: Request for real measurements: Criticism of the non-binding nature of EU directives
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana Ćaleta seeks real measurements of shading, and not virtual simulations.
sections.content_en: Andrijana Ćaleta expresses dissatisfaction with the stance that European directives on shading are not mandatory, but only guidelines. She emphasizes that European directives clearly prescribe how measurements should be conducted, including the placement of poles of a certain height and measurements over a period of one to three years, and not by virtual simulations. She points out that locals do not want to 'believe' in the results of software simulations, but rather demand **exact measurements** to determine the actual impact. Ivana, an expert, tries to downplay the problem by stating that shading occurs only one month a year, in the evening hours, which Andrijana considers an insufficient explanation for the seriousness of the problem.

sections.subtitle: Servisni plato i devastacija terena: Pitanja o vizualnom utjecaju
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana Ćaleta pita o izgradnji servisnog platoa i njegovom utjecaju na teren.
sections.content: Andrijana Ćaleta postavlja pitanje o izgradnji servisnog platoa veličine 1.5 kilometara za turbinu na katastarskoj čestici 1/36 u Gornjem Brišniku. Ističe da se ta lokacija nalazi u maloj borovoj šumi i na padini, što zahtijeva značajne zemljane radove. Pita investitora, Vlaga Pehu, hoće li se teren nasipati ili ukopavati kako bi se dobio ravni plato, naglašavajući da su obje opcije vizualno neprihvatljive. Upozorava na već postojeću devastaciju terena u Eminovu selu i na Tušnici, gdje su 'planine potpuno izmasačirane'. Vlago Peha odgovara da će se 'vrlo vjerojatno dio nasuti, a dio ukopati', što dodatno zabrinjava mještane zbog vizualnog i ekološkog utjecaja.

magisterium.assessment: Devastacija terena i vizualni utjecaj bez suglasnosti lokalne zajednice narušavaju sklad stvorenoga svijeta i lokalni identitet.
magisterium.enrichment: Briga za zajednički dom uključuje zaštitu bioraznolikosti i krajolika koji su dar Stvoritelja za sve generacije.
