magisterium.assessment_en: Devastation of the terrain and visual impact without the consent of the local community disrupt the harmony of the created world and local identity.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Care for the common home includes the protection of biodiversity and landscapes which are a gift of the Creator for all generations.
concerns_en: Violation of the visual integrity of the home

sections.subtitle_en: Service plateau and terrain devastation: Questions about visual impact
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana Ćaleta asks about the construction of a service plateau and its impact on the terrain.
sections.content_en: Andrijana Ćaleta asks a question about the construction of a service plateau 1.5 kilometers in size for a turbine on cadastral parcel 1/36 in Gornji Brišnik. She points out that this location is in a small pine forest and on a slope, which requires significant earthworks. She asks the investor, Vlago Pehu, whether the terrain will be filled or excavated to obtain a flat plateau, emphasizing that both options are visually unacceptable. She warns of the already existing devastation of the terrain in Eminovo selo and on Tušnica, where 'mountains are completely massacred'. Vlago Peha replies that 'very likely a part will be filled, and a part excavated', which further worries the locals due to the visual and ecological impact.

sections.subtitle: Emotivno svjedočanstvo mještanina: Život pod vjetrenjačama
sections.screenshot_description: Mještanin emotivno svjedoči o buci i oštećenjima uzrokovanim vjetroturbinama.
sections.content: Jedan mještanin emotivno svjedoči o teškom životu pod postojećim vjetrenjačama, opisujući neizdrživu buku i grmljavinu koja traje 24 sata dnevno. Ističe da je zbog miniranja došlo do oštećenja na njegovoj kući i čatrnji. Pita investitore zašto su turbine postavljene tako blizu kuća – 90 metara od Milanove kuće, 150 metara od Kazine kuće i 200 metara od njegove. Naglašava da zasjenjenje 'zamanata' njega i njegovu suprugu, te da nitko nije pitao mještane za mišljenje prije postavljanja turbina. Poziva investitore da dođu i pokušaju živjeti pod vjetrenjačama, ističući da im 'glava puca od vjetra i buke', te da moraju isključivati sve uređaje u kući zbog privlačenja groma. Zaključuje da mu turbine smetaju i da ih želi ukloniti.

magisterium.assessment: Izravno ugrožavanje dostojanstva i zdravlja mještana neizdrživom bukom narušava pravo na dostojan život.
magisterium.enrichment: Čovjek ne smije biti sveden na sredstvo za proizvodnju ili žrtvu spekulacije.

magisterium.assessment_en: Direct endangering of the dignity and health of the residents with unbearable noise violates the right to a dignified life.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Man must not be reduced to a means of production or a victim of speculation.
concerns_en: Violation of the right to a dignified life

sections.subtitle_en: Emotional testimony of a local resident: Life under windmills
sections.screenshot_description_en: A local resident emotionally testifies about the noise and damages caused by wind turbines.
sections.content_en: One local resident emotionally testifies about the difficult life under the existing wind turbines, describing unbearable noise and thunder that lasts 24 hours a day. He points out that due to blasting, damage occurred to his house and cistern. He asks the investors why the turbines were placed so close to houses – 90 meters from Milan's house, 150 meters from Kazina's house, and 200 meters from his. He emphasizes that the shading 'bothers' him and his wife, and that no one asked the locals for their opinion before installing the turbines. He invites the investors to come and try to live under the wind turbines, pointing out that their 'head is bursting from the wind and noise', and that they have to turn off all devices in the house due to attracting lightning. He concludes that the turbines bother him and that he wants them removed.

sections.subtitle: Kritika korupcije i 'likova' koji su doveli investitore
sections.screenshot_description: Mir Bagarić kritizira korupciju i političke strukture.
sections.content: Mir Bagarić, predsjednik Mjesne zajednice Vukovar, oštro kritizira političke strukture i pojedince koji su doveli investitore, optužujući ih za korupciju i mito. Izražava žaljenje što ti 'likovi' nisu prisutni na javnoj raspravi. S gorčinom spominje da su se ti isti 'ponosno slikali u Beogradu ispod cara Dušana bez hrvatskih obilježja', implicirajući njihovu izdaju nacionalnih interesa. Njegova izjava odražava duboko nepovjerenje u transparentnost procesa i integritet onih koji donose odluke o ovakvim projektima.

magisterium.assessment: Korupcija pri dovođenju investitora razara društveno tkivo i opće dobro.
magisterium.enrichment: Korupcija je proces koji uništava bratstvo i pretvara javnu službu u privatni posjed.

To the third group of Bishops of the Episcopal Conference of the Philippines (October 30, 2003)

magisterium.assessment_en: Corruption in bringing investors destroys the social fabric and the common good.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Corruption is a process that destroys brotherhood and transforms public service into private property.

sections.subtitle_en: Criticism of corruption and 'characters' who brought investors
sections.screenshot_description_en: Mir Bagarić criticizes corruption and political structures.
sections.content_en: Mir Bagarić, president of the Local Community Vukovar, sharply criticizes political structures and individuals who brought investors, accusing them of corruption and bribery. He expresses regret that these 'characters' are not present at the public discussion. With bitterness he mentions that these same ones 'proudly photographed themselves in Belgrade beneath Emperor Dušan without Croatian insignia', implying their betrayal of national interests. His statement reflects deep distrust in the transparency of the process and the integrity of those who make decisions about such projects.

iterations.theme_en: Impact on people, distance from settlements and first emotional reactions of residents

iterations.theme: Šira kritika projekta: arheologija, državno zemljište, voda i politički aspekti

sections.subtitle: Optužbe za korupciju i dovođenje investitora
sections.screenshot_description: Mir Bagarić, predsjednik Mjesne zajednice Vukovar, oštro kritizira one koji su doveli investitore, spominjući ratne zasluge i optužbe za mito.
sections.content: Mir Bagarić, predsjednik Mjesne zajednice Vukovar, započeo je svoje izlaganje oštrom kritikom onih koji su doveli investitore, izražavajući žaljenje što ti pojedinci nisu prisutni. Bagarić je istaknuo svoje ratne zasluge, navodeći petnaest mjeseci provedenih u rovovima i devet godina služenja vojske, te je te zasluge usporedio s postupcima onih koji se, kako je rekao, 'ponosno slikaju u Beogradu ispod cara Dušana bez hrvatskih obilježja'. Direktno je optužio prisutne za primanje mita, tvrdeći da su zbog toga došli na raspravu. Maja Bevanda iz Federalnog ministarstva okoliša i turizma kratko je odgovorila da 'radi samo za plaću'.

magisterium.assessment: Neprocesuiranje mita potiče kulturu nekažnjivosti i moralnu degradaciju društva.
magisterium.enrichment: Razina korupcije indikator je moralnog stanja cijelog društva i zahtijeva odlučnu akciju vlasti.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Ukrainian Catholic Church: Christ – Our Pascha
citations.document_author: Synod of the Ukrainian Greek Catholic Church

magisterium.assessment_en: Failure to prosecute bribery encourages a culture of impunity and the moral degradation of society.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The level of corruption is an indicator of the moral state of the entire society and demands decisive action from the authorities.
concerns_en: Absence of the rule of law

sections.subtitle_en: Accusations of corruption and bringing investors
sections.screenshot_description_en: Mir Bagarić, president of Mjesne zajednice Vukovar, sharply criticizes those who brought investors, mentioning war merits and accusations of bribery.
sections.content_en: Mir Bagarić, president of the Local Community Vukovar, began his presentation with a sharp criticism of those who brought investors, expressing regret that these individuals were not present. Bagarić highlighted his war merits, stating fifteen months spent in the trenches and nine years of military service, and compared these merits with the actions of those who, as he said, 'proudly pose for pictures in Belgrade under Emperor Dušan without Croatian insignia'. He directly accused those present of accepting bribes, claiming that this was why they came to the discussion. Maja Bevanda from the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism briefly replied that she 'only works for a salary'.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Vijećnik Kelav upozorava na arheološka nalazišta i opasnost za ponor Kovači
sections.screenshot_description: Ivica Kelav, vijećnik Općinskog vijeća, objašnjava značaj arheoloških nalazišta i opasnost miniranja za ponor Kovači.
sections.content: Ivica Kelav, vijećnik Općinskog vijeća, pridružio se kritici, ističući da se o problemima vjetroparkova govori već pet do šest godina. Posebno je naglasio važnost arheoloških nalazišta poput Samograda 1 i 2, te pećine Dachna, koju je osobno posjetio. Opisao je pećinu Dachna kao prostranstvo duboko 900 metara, s 200 prahistorijskih jedinki, staru 17.000 godina, naglašavajući da takvo nalazište nema nigdje u svijetu i da bi u bilo kojoj europskoj državi bilo zaštićena zona. Kelav je izrazio apsurdnost rasprave o miniranju, bušenju i ispitivanju stijena u blizini ponora Kovači. Upozorio je na rizik urušavanja stijena koje bi mogle začepiti ponor, što bi dovelo do poplava i pretvaranja Buškog jezera u močvaru na dvije do tri godine. Također je kritizirao Federalno ministarstvo okoliša i turizma što nije stalo na stranu građana, ignorirajući pozive i odbijajući doći na javnu raspravu ranije. Postavio je pitanje o utjecaju projekta na ljude i susjedne parcele, ističući da Ministarstvo brine o okolišu, ali zanemaruje stanovništvo.

magisterium.assessment: Zanemarivanje arheološke baštine i ekoloških rizika ponora ugrožava zajedničku baštinu.
magisterium.enrichment: Kulturna baština je ključna za ljudski napredak i mora biti pravno zaštićena radi lokalnog stanovništva.

magisterium.assessment_en: Neglect of archaeological heritage and ecological risks of the sinkhole threatens common heritage.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Cultural heritage is crucial for human progress and must be legally protected for the local population.

sections.subtitle_en: Councilor Kelav warns about archaeological sites and the danger to Kovači sinkhole.
sections.screenshot_description_en: Ivica Kelav, councilor of the Municipal Council, explains the significance of archaeological sites and the danger of mining for the Kovači sinkhole.
sections.content_en: Ivica Kelav, councilor of the Municipal Council, joined the criticism, pointing out that the problems of wind farms have been discussed for five to six years already. He particularly emphasized the importance of archaeological sites such as Samograd 1 and 2, and the Dachna cave, which he personally visited. He described the Dachna cave as an expanse 900 meters deep, with 200 prehistoric individuals, 17,000 years old, emphasizing that such a site does not exist anywhere in the world and that it would be a protected zone in any European country. Kelav expressed the absurdity of discussing blasting, drilling, and testing rocks near the Kovači sinkhole. He warned of the risk of rock collapse that could block the sinkhole, which would lead to floods and the transformation of Buško jezero into a swamp for two to three years. He also criticized the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism for not siding with the citizens, ignoring calls and refusing to attend the public discussion earlier. He raised the question of the project's impact on people and neighboring plots, pointing out that the Ministry cares about the environment but neglects the population.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Sporno državno zemljište i preopterećenost elektroprijenosne mreže
sections.screenshot_description: Andrijana i Ivica Kelav razgovaraju o prodaji državnog zemljišta i tužbi Državnog pravobraniteljstva, te o problemima s priključenjem na elektroprijenosnu mrežu.
sections.content: Ivica Kelav postavio je pitanje o zakonitosti prodaje državnog zemljišta od strane općine i županije, tvrdeći da je to nezakonito. Andrijana je nadopunila informaciju, navodeći da je Državno pravobraniteljstvo 8. svibnja podnijelo tužbu protiv Federalnog ministarstva okoliša i turizma zbog postupanja u slučaju vjetroelektrane u Čadiju, gdje je dozvola izdana unatoč tome što se radilo o državnom zemljištu. Najavila je dostavu zemljišno-knjižnih izvadaka kako bi se dokazalo da se i ovaj projekt uglavnom planira na državnom zemljištu za koje postoji zabrana raspolaganja. Kelav je također izrazio zabrinutost zbog priključenja planiranih 100 MW na mrežu, ističući da trenutno ne postoji dovoljan kapacitet. Spomenuo je planove za izgradnju novih hidroelektrana (HPP) i dalekovoda diljem općine Tomislavgrad, uključujući osam vjetro polja i dvanaest solarnih polja, pitajući investitore bi li oni sami željeli živjeti u takvom okruženju.

magisterium.assessment: Upitna zakonitost prodaje državnog zemljišta i preopterećenje mreže ukazuju na netransparentno upravljanje.
magisterium.enrichment: Opće dobro zahtijeva društvene uvjete koji omogućuju procvat, a ne kaos u upravljanju.

magisterium.assessment_en: Questionable legality of the sale of state land and network overload indicate non-transparent management.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The common good requires social conditions which enable flourishing, and not chaos in governance.

sections.subtitle_en: Disputed state land and overload of the electricity transmission network
sections.screenshot_description_en: Andrijana and Ivica Kelav talk about the sale of state land and the lawsuit of the State Attorney's Office, and about problems with connection to the electricity transmission network.
sections.content_en: Ivica Kelav raised a question about the legality of the sale of state land by the municipality and county, claiming that it is illegal. Andrijana supplemented the information, stating that the State Attorney's Office filed a lawsuit on May 8 against the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism due to actions in the case of a wind farm in Čadij, where the permit was issued despite it being state land. She announced the delivery of land registry excerpts to prove that this project is also mostly planned on state land for which there is a prohibition of disposal. Kelav also expressed concern about connecting the planned 100 MW to the grid, pointing out that there is currently insufficient capacity. He mentioned plans for the construction of new hydroelectric power plants (HPP) and power lines throughout the municipality of Tomislavgrad, including eight wind fields and twelve solar fields, asking investors if they themselves would want to live in such an environment.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Odvjetnik Vegradine o vlasništvu zemljišta i priključenju na mrežu
sections.screenshot_description: Odvjetnik Vegradine objašnjava pravni status zemljišta i proces priključenja vjetroelektrane na mrežu.
sections.content: Odvjetnik Vegradine, Tamar Močevic, odgovorio je na pitanja o vlasništvu zemljišta i priključenju na mrežu. Naglasio je da Vegradina nema zemljišno-knjižnu imovinu, već da je sva zemljišta na kojima je planirana izgradnja vjetroturbina, pristupnih puteva i trafostanica isključivo u vlasništvu Općine Tomislavgrad. Tvrdi da se radi o građevinskom zemljištu koje, sukladno Zakonu o privremenoj zabrani raspolaganja, nije predmet te zabrane. Što se tiče priključenja, uvjeti su izdani u prosincu prošle godine, ali izgradnju priključka na prijenosnu mrežu ne provodi Vegradina, već Elektroprijenos BiH, koji će ishodovati sve potrebne dozvole. Andrijana je replicirala, ističući da su kapaciteti elektroprijenosne mreže županije trenutno potpuno popunjeni, što znači da svaki novi vjetropark zahtijeva izgradnju dodatnih dalekovoda. Podsjetila je da je Vlada Federacije BiH na hitnoj telefonskoj sjednici proglasila izgradnju novog dalekovoda javnim interesom, čime su stvoreni preduvjeti za oduzimanje privatnog zemljišta. Time će, kako je navela, stanovništvo platiti uništen krajolik i prirodu vlastitim novcem. Ivica Kelav je apelirao na investitore da odustanu, upozoravajući na spremnost građana da se suprotstave izgradnji.

magisterium.assessment: Proceduralno opravdanje odvjetnika o vlasništvu bez stvarne odgovornosti ostaje na pravnom formalizmu.
magisterium.enrichment: Ekonomski izbori moraju biti usmjereni prema općem dobru, a ne samo prema uskim interesima.

citations.document_title: Encyclical Letter of His Holiness Leo XIV Magnifica Humanitas (15 May 2026)

magisterium.assessment_en: The lawyer's procedural justification regarding ownership without real responsibility remains at legal formalism.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Economic choices must be directed towards the common good, and not only towards narrow interests.

sections.subtitle_en: Lawyer Vegradine on land ownership and connection to the network
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vegradina's lawyer explains the legal status of the land and the process of connecting the wind farm to the grid.
sections.content_en: Vegradina's lawyer, Tamar Močevic, answered questions about land ownership and grid connection. He emphasized that Vegradina does not have land-registry property, but that all land on which the construction of wind turbines, access roads, and substations is planned is exclusively owned by the Municipality of Tomislavgrad. He claims that it is construction land which, in accordance with the Law on Temporary Prohibition of Disposal, is not subject to that prohibition. Regarding the connection, the conditions were issued in December last year, but the construction of the connection to the transmission network is not carried out by Vegradina, but by Elektroprijenos BiH, which will obtain all necessary permits. Andrijana replied, pointing out that the capacities of the county's electricity transmission network are currently fully occupied, which means that every new wind farm requires the construction of additional power lines. She reminded that the Government of the Federation of BiH, at an urgent telephone session, declared the construction of a new power line a public interest, thereby creating preconditions for the expropriation of private land. Thus, as she stated, the population will pay for the destroyed landscape and nature with their own money. Ivica Kelav appealed to the investors to withdraw, warning of the citizens' readiness to oppose the construction.

sections.subtitle: Mlada građanka o otpadu, miniranju i utjecaju na faunu
sections.screenshot_description: Mlada građanka postavlja pitanja o planu upravljanja otpadom, rizicima miniranja u krškom području i utjecaju na ptice i šišmiše.
sections.content: Mlada građanka, gospođa Crnac, izrazila je zabrinutost kao mlada stanovnica općine koja ne planira otići. Postavila je pitanje o planu upravljanja otpadom, konkretno gdje će se odlagati otpad, posebno ulja i maziva, s obzirom na to da se područje nalazi iznad pitkih podzemnih voda. Ana Tomas iz Zagreb Inspecta objasnila je da plan definira postupanje s opasnim i neopasnim otpadom te da se sklapaju ugovori s ovlaštenim tvrtkama za zbrinjavanje, no nije precizirala lokacije deponija. Gospođa Crnac je dalje pitala o rizicima miniranja u krškom području, upozoravajući na mogućnost oštećenja špilja, jama i izvora vode, te na potencijalno urušavanje podzemnih voda u slučaju većeg potresa. Ana Tomas je odgovorila da će se u glavnom projektu kroz misiju G21 definirati seizmiologija, tektonika i geologija, te da će se miniranje provoditi uz geološko-geotehnički nadzor. Mlada građanka je također izrazila zabrinutost zbog utjecaja na ptice i šišmiše, pitajući hoće li se provesti studija utjecaja na okoliš koja bi procijenila mortalitet tih životinja. Maja Bevanda je potvrdila da će, ukoliko Ministarstvo odluči da je studija potrebna, sve argumentirane primjedbe biti obaveza investitora. Gospođa Crnac je apelirala na Ministarstvo da uzme u obzir mlade koji žele ostati u svom kraju i razvijati općinu, a ne gledati 'gromade' vjetroturbina.

magisterium.assessment: Iskazuje visoku razinu odgovornosti prema lokalnoj zajednici i budućim generacijama, naglašavajući očuvanje faune i održivi ostanak na rodnoj grudi.
magisterium.enrichment: Briga za stvoreni svijet neraskidivo je povezana s međugeneracijskom pravednošću i očuvanjem zajedničkog doma.

citations.document_title: Forming Consciences for Faithful Citizenship
citations.document_author: United States Conference of Catholic Bishops

magisterium.assessment_en: It shows a high level of responsibility towards the local community and future generations, emphasizing the preservation of fauna and sustainable remaining on the native soil.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Care for the created world is inextricably linked with intergenerational justice and the preservation of our common home.

sections.subtitle_en: Young citizen about waste, mining and impact on fauna
sections.screenshot_description_en: A young citizen asks questions about the waste management plan, the risks of blasting in the karst area, and the impact on birds and bats.
sections.content_en: Young citizen, Mrs. Crnac, expressed concern as a young resident of the municipality who does not plan to leave. She asked a question about the waste management plan, specifically where waste would be disposed of, especially oils and lubricants, given that the area is located above potable groundwater. Ana Tomas from Zagreb Inspecta explained that the plan defines the handling of hazardous and non-hazardous waste and that contracts are concluded with authorized disposal companies, but she did not specify the locations of the landfills. Mrs. Crnac further asked about the risks of blasting in the karst area, warning about the possibility of damage to caves, pits, and water sources, and the potential collapse of groundwater in the event of a major earthquake. Ana Tomas replied that seismology, tectonics, and geology would be defined in the main project through mission G21, and that blasting would be carried out under geological-geotechnical supervision. The young citizen also expressed concern about the impact on birds and bats, asking whether an environmental impact study would be conducted to assess the mortality of these animals. Maja Bevanda confirmed that, if the Ministry decides that a study is necessary, all reasoned objections will be the investor's obligation. Mrs. Crnac appealed to the Ministry to consider young people who want to stay in their region and develop the municipality, and not look at 'giants' of wind turbines.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Speleolog Madanić o pogreškama u studiji i sukobu interesa
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Madanić, predsjednik Speleološkog društva Mijatovi dvori, kritizira nedostatke u studiji i sukob interesa pri odabiru izrađivača.
sections.content: Domagoj Madanić, magistar geografije i predsjednik Speleološkog društva Mijatovi dvori, postavio je niz pitanja o okolišu. Pitao je predstavnike Zagreb Inspecta koliko su dana proveli na terenskom istraživanju i kako objašnjavaju navode u studiji da su Grabovica i Midena ista planina te da je Buško jezero nastalo pregrađivanjem rijeke Cetine. Ana Tomas je priznala da su to bile pogreške. Madanić je potom pitao Federalno ministarstvo okoliša i turizma o smislu da investitor sam bira tvrtku koja će mu pisati studiju utjecaja na okoliš, ukazujući na sukob interesa, s obzirom na to da Zagreb Inspect radi i poslove tehničkog pregleda vjetroelektrana. Maja Bevanda je odgovorila da Ministarstvo nema utjecaja na izbor konzultantske kuće s liste ovlaštenih, te da svaka tvrtka s te liste ima profesionalni dignitet i stručnjake koji rade na izradi dokumenata.

magisterium.assessment: Beskompromisno brani istinu struke i znanstveni integritet, upozoravajući na moralno nedopustiv sukob interesa koji podriva povjerenje u javne procese.
magisterium.enrichment: Znanstvena istraživanja moraju biti slobodna od političko-ekonomskih pritisaka kako bi služila istini i općem dobru.

citations.document_title: Laudato Si

magisterium.assessment_en: Uncompromisingly defends the truth of the profession and scientific integrity, warning of a morally unacceptable conflict of interest which undermines trust in public processes.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Scientific research must be free from political-economic pressures in order to serve truth and the common good.

sections.subtitle_en: Speleologist Madanić on errors in the study and conflict of interest
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Madanić, president of the Speleological Society Mijatovi dvori, criticizes shortcomings in the study and conflict of interest in the selection of the developer.
sections.content_en: Domagoj Madanić, Master of Geography and president of the Speleological Society Mijatovi dvori, posed a series of questions about the environment. He asked representatives of Zagreb Inspect how many days they spent on field research and how they explain the claims in the study that Grabovica and Midena are the same mountain and that Buško Lake was formed by damming the Cetina River. Ana Tomas admitted that these were errors. Madanić then asked the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism about the sense of an investor choosing the company that will write the environmental impact study for them, pointing to a conflict of interest, given that Zagreb Inspect also performs technical inspections of wind farms. Maja Bevanda replied that the Ministry has no influence on the selection of a consulting firm from the list of authorized ones, and that every company on that list has professional dignity and experts who work on the preparation of documents.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Zanemarene vrtače i speleološki objekti: Kritika geološke studije
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Madanić i Andrijana kritiziraju nedostatak podataka o vrtačama i speleološkim objektima u studiji, te dovode u pitanje vjerodostojnost arheološkog elaborata.
sections.content: Domagoj Madanić ponovno je postavio pitanje o 85.000 vrtača i 120 istraženih speleoloških objekata na području Grabovice i Midene, pitajući zašto tako značajni podaci, koji ukazuju na veliku ponornu zonu, nisu spomenuti u studiji. Ana Tomas se pozvala na arheološki elaborat, objašnjavajući da je Zavod za zaštitu spomenika tražio dodatne studije (stručnu građevinsku procjenu za pećinu Dachna i zaštitna arheološka iskopavanja na gomili broj 3) prije izdavanja pozitivnog mišljenja. Andrijana je oštro kritizirala fokus na arheologiju umjesto na geologiju i geomorfologiju, citirajući dopis Federalnog zavoda za zaštitu spomenika koji potvrđuje da investitor nije dostavio tražene elaborate, te da Zavod stoga nije dao pozitivno stručno mišljenje. Maja Bevanda je potvrdila da Ministarstvo neće izdati rješenje bez pozitivnog stručnog mišljenja Zavoda. Madanić je ponovno naglasio važnost vrtača i speleoloških objekata za razumijevanje krškog terena i pitao kako će se postupati u slučaju pronalaska kaverni tijekom miniranja. Ivana, stručnjakinja, objasnila je da se u takvim slučajevima radovi zaustavljaju i provodi istraživanje, te da se koristi kontrolirano miniranje. Madanić je zaključio da je geologija i geomorfologija u studiji 'očajno odrađena'.

magisterium.assessment: Ukazuje na nužnost uvažavanja cjelovite stvarnosti ekosustava, kritizirajući redukcionistički pristup koji zanemaruje tisuće prirodnih fenomena.
magisterium.enrichment: Svaki ekosustav ima vrijednost koja prethodi ljudskoj koristi i zahtijeva pažljivo proučavanje prije zahvata.

citations.document_title: Laudato Si

magisterium.assessment_en: It points to the necessity of considering the complete reality of ecosystems, criticizing the reductionist approach which ignores thousands of natural phenomena.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Every ecosystem has value that precedes human use and requires careful study before intervention.

sections.subtitle_en: Neglected sinkholes and speleological objects: Critique of the geological study
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Madanić and Andrijana criticize the lack of data on sinkholes and speleological objects in the study, and question the credibility of the archaeological elaborate.
sections.content_en: Domagoj Madanić again raised the question about 85,000 sinkholes and 120 explored speleological objects in the area of Grabovica and Midena, asking why such significant data, which indicate a large sinkhole zone, were not mentioned in the study. Ana Tomas referred to the archaeological elaborate, explaining that the Institute for the Protection of Monuments requested additional studies (an expert construction assessment for the Dachna cave and protective archaeological excavations at mound number 3) before issuing a positive opinion. Andrijana sharply criticized the focus on archaeology instead of geology and geomorphology, citing a letter from the Federal Institute for the Protection of Monuments which confirms that the investor did not submit the requested elaborates, and that the Institute therefore did not give a positive expert opinion. Maja Bevanda confirmed that the Ministry will not issue a decision without a positive expert opinion from the Institute. Madanić again emphasized the importance of sinkholes and speleological objects for understanding karst terrain and asked how to proceed in case of finding caverns during blasting. Ivana, an expert, explained that in such cases, works are stopped and research is conducted, and that controlled blasting is used. Madanić concluded that the geology and geomorphology in the study were 'desperately done'.
entities_en: Institute for the Protection of Monuments

sections.subtitle: Turbina na vrhu Midene i neupućenost Ministarstva
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Madanić pita Ministarstvo o turbini koja će uništiti vrh planine Midene, dok mještanin kritizira neupućenost Ministarstva na primjeru Tušnice.
sections.content: Domagoj Madanić postavio je pitanje Federalnom ministarstvu okoliša i turizma o turbini broj 27, koja se planira graditi samo 50 metara od najvišeg vrha Midene, Sinjala (1224 m). Izrazio je zabrinutost da će to uništiti glavno obilježje planine, jer će se teren morati sniziti za pristupni put. Mještanin je kritizirao pristranost tvrtke koja izrađuje projekte. Maja Bevanda je objasnila da Ministarstvo ne daje dozvole, već da zakon to čini ukoliko investitor ispuni sve propisane uvjete. Mještanin je potom oštro kritizirao Ministarstvo zbog neupućenosti, navodeći primjer vjetroparka Tušnica. Istaknuo je da je Tušnica vodozaštitno područje gdje se lokalnom stanovništvu zabranjuje gradnja kuća na vlastitoj djedovini, dok se investitorima dopušta izgradnja vjetroparka bez problema. Zaključio je da je Ministarstvo 'na putućeno' i da obmanjuje građane. Domagoj Madanić je ponovno apelirao na zaštitu prirodnih fenomena poput ponora Kovači, izvora, pećine Dachna i Samograda, te zatražio izradu stručne studije utjecaja na okoliš.

magisterium.assessment: Kritizira administrativnu površnost i neupućenost institucija, naglašavajući zaštitu najviših vrhova kao prirodne baštine.
magisterium.enrichment: Odgovorno vršenje vlasti zahtijeva pristup pouzdanim informacijama radi razboritih i pravednih odluka.

citations.document_title: Laudato Si

magisterium.assessment_en: Criticizes administrative superficiality and ignorance of institutions, emphasizing the protection of the highest peaks as natural heritage.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Responsible exercise of authority requires access to reliable information for prudent and just decisions.

sections.subtitle_en: Turbine on top of Midene and the Ministry's ignorance
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Madanić asks the Ministry about the turbine which will destroy the peak of Mount Midene, while a local criticizes the Ministry's ignorance on the example of Tušnice.
sections.content_en: Domagoj Madanić asked the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism about turbine number 27, which is planned to be built only 50 meters from the highest peak of Midena, Sinjal (1224 m). He expressed concern that this would destroy the main feature of the mountain, as the terrain would have to be lowered for an access road. A local resident criticized the bias of the company that develops the projects. Maja Bevanda explained that the Ministry does not issue permits, but that the law does so if the investor meets all prescribed conditions. The local resident then sharply criticized the Ministry for its ignorance, citing the example of the Tušnica wind farm. He pointed out that Tušnica is a water protection area where local residents are forbidden to build houses on their own ancestral land, while investors are allowed to build a wind farm without problems. He concluded that the Ministry is 'misinformed' and that it misleads citizens. Domagoj Madanić again appealed for the protection of natural phenomena such as the Kovači sinkhole, springs, Dachna and Samograd caves, and requested the preparation of an expert environmental impact study.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

iterations.theme_en: Broader criticism of the project: archaeology, state land, water and political aspects

iterations.theme: Detaljna pravna, ekonomska i ekološka analiza projekta i kritika sustava

sections.subtitle: Prirodni fenomeni na udaru: Zahtjev za sveobuhvatnom studijom utjecaja na okoliš
sections.screenshot_description: Domagoj Madanić, predstavnik Speleološkog društva Mijatovi dvori, postavlja ključno pitanje o zaštiti prirodnih fenomena.
sections.content:
Domagoj Madanić, predsjednik Speleološkog društva Mijatovi dvori i magistar geografije, izrazio je zabrinutost zbog ugroženosti brojnih prirodnih fenomena na području Grabovičke visoravni, uključujući ponorkovače, izvorišta, špilje (poput Dahne) te lokalitete Veliki i Mali Samograd. Postavio je pitanje Federalnom ministarstvu okoliša i turizma je li ih zainteresirala buduća zaštita tih fenomena te hoće li naložiti stručnu studiju utjecaja na okoliš.

Maja Bevanda, voditeljica postupka iz Federalnog ministarstva, zatražila je od Ane Tomas, predstavnice Zagreb Inspecta, da odgovori na pitanje o utjecaju na podzemlje. U emotivnom istupu, Maja Bevanda je naglasila da je došla raditi svoj posao i da je cijeli dan izložena uvredama, ističući da zakon mora biti isti za sve.

Domagoj Madanić ponovio je svoje pitanje, na što je Ana Tomas odgovorila da je zahtjev za prethodnu procjenu prepoznao probleme, ali da se detaljna obrada svih 85.000 vrtača i 200 speleoloških objekata ne može očekivati u toj fazi, već u punoj studiji. Maja Bevanda je dodala da lokalna zajednica ima mogućnost pokrenuti proceduru zaštite područja od značaja.

Andrijana Ćaleta, predstavnica građana, zaključila je da se država odrekla zaštite građana te da je sada na samim građanima da se štite. Posebno je kritizirala nedostatak hidrogeološke analize za ključna vodocrpilišta poput Brišnika i Cebare, ističući da su svi podzemni kanali međusobno povezani. Zatražila je izradu pune studije utjecaja na okoliš, uz nadzor javnosti, te je pozvala na prosvjed u ime brojnih udruga i mjesnih zajednica.

Andrijana Ćaleta također je dovela u pitanje vjerodostojnost podataka na kojima Ministarstvo donosi odluke, te je kritizirala Zagreb Inspect zbog navodnog nedostatka stručnjaka ekologije u timu koji je radio procjenu. Ana Tomas je odgovorila da Federalno ministarstvo okoliša i turizma izdaje ovlaštenja konzultantskim kućama na temelju pravilnika koji propisuje obvezno zapošljavanje stručnjaka poput kemičara, biologa, hidrologa i geografa, te da je besmisleno dovoditi u pitanje ispunjenost tih uvjeta.

magisterium.assessment: Zagovara cjelovit pristup zaštiti prirode kroz sveobuhvatne studije i promiče načelo opreznosti pred nepopravljivim utjecajima.
magisterium.enrichment: Cjelovita ekologija zahtijeva analizu svih čimbenika i interakcija unutar ekosustava radi zaštite života.

citations.document_title: Laudato Si

magisterium.assessment_en: Advocates a holistic approach to nature protection through comprehensive studies and promotes the precautionary principle against irreparable impacts.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Integral ecology requires an analysis of all factors and interactions within the ecosystem for the protection of life.

sections.subtitle_en: Natural phenomena under threat: Demand for a comprehensive environmental impact study
sections.screenshot_description_en: Domagoj Madanić, representative of the Speleological Society Mijatovi dvori, poses a key question about the protection of natural phenomena.
sections.content_en: Domagoj Madanić, president of the Speleological Society Mijatovi dvori and master of geography, expressed concern about the endangerment of numerous natural phenomena in the Grabovica plateau area, including sinkholes, springs, caves (such as Dahna) and the localities Veliki and Mali Samograd. He asked the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism if they were interested in the future protection of these phenomena and if they would order an expert environmental impact study. Maja Bevanda, process manager from the Federal Ministry, asked Ana Tomas, a representative of Zagreb Inspect, to answer the question about the impact on the underground. In an emotional statement, Maja Bevanda emphasized that she came to do her job and that she had been exposed to insults all day, stressing that the law must be the same for everyone. Domagoj Madanić repeated his question, to which Ana Tomas replied that the request for a preliminary assessment recognized the problems, but that a detailed processing of all 85,000 sinkholes and 200 speleological objects cannot be expected at that stage, but in a full study. Maja Bevanda added that the local community has the possibility to initiate a procedure for the protection of areas of significance. Andrijana Ćaleta, a citizens' representative, concluded that the state had renounced the protection of its citizens and that it was now up to the citizens themselves to protect themselves. She particularly criticized the lack of hydrogeological analysis for key water sources such as Brišnik and Cebara, emphasizing that all underground channels are interconnected. She requested the preparation of a full environmental impact study, with public oversight, and called for a protest on behalf of numerous associations and local communities. Andrijana Ćaleta also questioned the credibility of the data on which the Ministry makes decisions, and criticized Zagreb Inspect for the alleged lack of ecology experts in the team that conducted the assessment. Ana Tomas replied that the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism issues authorizations to consulting firms based on regulations that prescribe the mandatory employment of experts such as chemists, biologists, hydrologists, and geographers, and that it is pointless to question the fulfillment of these conditions.
entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Energetski sektor kao poligon za geostrateške interese i korupciju
sections.screenshot_description: Ivan Dolić iz Livna iznosi oštru kritiku energetskog sektora i političkih struktura.
sections.content:
Ivan Dolić iz Livna, bivši djelatnik Ministarstva gospodarstva Hercegbosanske županije, iznio je oštru kritiku, opisujući situaciju kao "geostrateški napad na županiju preko energetskog sektora". Istaknuo je bogatstvo vodnih resursa županije, uključujući rijeke Sturbu, Bistricu, Žabljak i Šuicu, te brojne izvore, pitajući zašto se elektrane grade upravo na tim osjetljivim područjima i krškom terenu, trajno mijenjajući krajobraz i vrhove planina.

Dolić je doveo u pitanje valjanost procedura dodjele koncesija, tvrdeći da su mnoge koncesije podijeljene mimo zakona, čak i prije nego što je zakon o koncesijama uopće predviđao vjetroparkove. Naglasio je da je zakon o koncesijama iz 2008. godine proglašen nevažećim od strane Vrhovnog suda, a novi je donesen tek 2023. godine. Također je kritizirao izradu prostornog plana bez prethodnih procjena utjecaja na okoliš.

Posebno je istaknuo problem energetske strategije Bosne i Hercegovine, koja, prema njegovim riječima, ne postoji, unatoč višku proizvedene energije. Kritizirao je subvencije za obnovljive izvore energije, navodeći da je u prošloj godini podijeljeno preko 120 milijuna KM, te je spomenuo konkretan primjer vjetroelektrane Jelovača koja je dobila značajne poticaje.

Dolić je optužio političke strukture za korupciju i prodaju struje strancima, citirajući izjavu predsjednika Vlade da je električna energija "tržišna roba" koju je važno prodati, a ne osigurati za domaće potrebe. Smatra da je to način za naplatu korumpiranih političkih struktura na svim razinama vlasti.

magisterium.assessment: Razotkriva strukture grijeha unutar energetskog sektora, pozivajući na etičku obnovu i zaštitu javnog interesa od koruptivnih mreža.
magisterium.enrichment: Solidarnost zahtijeva odlučnu borbu protiv korupcije i podređivanje partikularnih interesa općem dobru.

citations.document_title: 54th World Day of Peace 2021 - A Culture of Care as a Path to Peace

magisterium.assessment_en: It uncovers structures of sin within the energy sector, calling for ethical renewal and protection of public interest from corrupt networks.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Solidarity requires a decisive fight against corruption and the subordination of particular interests to the common good.

sections.subtitle_en: Energy sector as a proving ground for geostrategic interests and corruption
sections.screenshot_description_en: Ivan Dolić from Livno presents sharp criticism of the energy sector and political structures.
sections.content_en:
Ivan Dolić from Livno, former employee of the Ministry of Economy of Hercegbosna County, presented a sharp criticism, describing the situation as "a geostrategic attack on the county through the energy sector." He highlighted the richness of the county's water resources, including the rivers Sturba, Bistrica, Žabljak, and Šuica, and numerous springs, asking why power plants are being built precisely in these sensitive areas and karst terrain, permanently changing the landscape and mountain peaks.
Dolić questioned the validity of concession granting procedures, claiming that many concessions were distributed outside the law, even before the concession law even foresaw wind farms. He emphasized that the concession law from 2008 was declared invalid by the Supreme Court, and a new one was adopted only in 2023. He also criticized the creation of the spatial plan without prior environmental impact assessments.
He particularly highlighted the problem of Bosnia and Herzegovina's energy strategy, which, according to him, does not exist, despite the surplus of produced energy. He criticized subsidies for renewable energy sources, stating that over 120 million KM were distributed last year, and he mentioned a specific example of the Jelovača wind farm which received significant incentives.
Dolić accused political structures of corruption and selling electricity to foreigners, quoting the Prime Minister's statement that electricity is "marketable goods" which is important to sell, and not to secure for domestic needs. He believes that this is a way for corrupt political structures at all levels of government to collect payment.

sections.subtitle: Nevidljive prijetnje: Vibracije, kancerogena ulja i havarije vjetroelektrana
sections.screenshot_description: Ivan Dolić detaljno objašnjava utjecaj vibracija vjetroturbina na krški teren i podzemne vode.
sections.content:
Ivan Dolić je, kao inženjer strojarstva, detaljno objasnio potencijalne opasnosti vjetroturbina, posebno na krškom terenu. Naglasio je da vibracije koje proizvode vjetroturbine, posebno one snage 8-10 MW koje se prvi put instaliraju u Europi na takvom terenu, mogu imati katastrofalne posljedice. Objasnio je da se vibracije prenose kroz tlo, što u radijusu od 300 metara dovodi do nestanka životinja koje se gnijezde u tlu, narušavajući biljni i životinjski svijet. Posebno je istaknuo da je krški teren specifičan zbog pukotina, šupljina i heterogene stijenske mase, što pojačava širenje vibracija.

Upozorio je na opasnost od niskofrekventnih vibracija (0.2 do 30 Hz) koje su dominantne i koje sav živi svijet osjeća, iako ih ljudi ne čuju. Također je spomenuo turbulentna strujanja iza lopatica koja su nepodnošljiva i mogu se osjetiti i do 2.5 kilometara udaljenosti.

Dolić je skrenuo pažnju na problem kancerogenih ulja koja se koriste u turbinama i trafostanicama. Naveo je da jedna gondola vjetroturbine može sadržavati 700 litara ulja, transformator kubik, a skupna trafostanica čak 30 kubika ulja. Kritizirao je praksu postavljanja trafostanica na vrhovima brda, umjesto nizvodno od izvora vode, što predstavlja ogroman rizik za zagađenje podzemnih voda.

Postavio je ključna pitanja o sanaciji područja nakon isteka 30-godišnjeg vijeka trajanja vjetroelektrana te o odgovornosti u slučaju havarije. Istaknuo je da 5% vjetrenjača doživi havariju, uključujući požare i lomove lopatica, što može dovesti do ekoloških katastrofa.

magisterium.assessment: Tehničke ugroze zdravlju i okolišu bez adekvatne zaštite izravno ugrožavaju dostojanstvo ljudske osobe i integritet stvorenja.
magisterium.enrichment: Zdravlje je dragocjen dar koji društvo mora štititi osiguravanjem uvjeta za dostojanstven život.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church
Letter to the Pontifical Academy for Life congress "Quality of Life and Ethics of Health" (February 19, 2005)

magisterium.assessment_en: Technical threats to health and the environment without adequate protection directly threaten the dignity of the human person and the integrity of creation.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Health is a precious gift which society must protect by ensuring conditions for a dignified life.

sections.subtitle_en: Invisible threats: Vibrations, carcinogenic oils and wind farm failures
sections.screenshot_description_en: Ivan Dolić explains in detail the impact of wind turbine vibrations on karst terrain and groundwater.
sections.content_en: Ivan Dolić, as a mechanical engineer, explained in detail the potential dangers of wind turbines, especially on karst terrain. He emphasized that vibrations produced by wind turbines, especially those with a power of 8-10 MW which are being installed for the first time in Europe on such terrain, can have catastrophic consequences. He explained that vibrations are transmitted through the soil, which within a radius of 300 meters leads to the disappearance of animals nesting in the soil, disturbing flora and fauna. He particularly pointed out that karst terrain is specific due to cracks, cavities, and heterogeneous rock mass, which amplifies the spread of vibrations. He warned about the danger of low-frequency vibrations (0.2 to 30 Hz) which are dominant and which all living beings feel, even though people do not hear them. He also mentioned turbulent flows behind the blades which are unbearable and can be felt up to 2.5 kilometers away. Dolić drew attention to the problem of carcinogenic oils used in turbines and substations. He stated that one wind turbine nacelle can contain 700 liters of oil, a transformer one cubic meter, and a collective substation even 30 cubic meters of oil. He criticized the practice of placing substations on hilltops, instead of downstream from water sources, which represents an enormous risk for groundwater pollution. He posed key questions about the remediation of the area after the expiration of the 30-year lifespan of wind farms and about responsibility in case of an accident. He pointed out that 5% of wind turbines experience accidents, including fires and blade breakages, which can lead to ecological catastrophes.

sections.subtitle: Sustav u službi investitora: Zlouporaba ovlasti i ignoriranje javnog interesa
sections.screenshot_description: Ivan Dolić kritizira odsustvo predstavnika Federalnog ministarstva za energiju i optužuje Ministarstvo da služi investitorima.
sections.content:
Ivan Dolić je izrazio ogorčenje zbog odsustva predstavnika Federalnog ministarstva za energiju i županijskih vlasti na javnoj raspravi, ističući da su oni ključni za odgovore na pitanja o koncesijama i energetskoj politici. Optužio je Federalno ministarstvo okoliša i turizma da je u službi investitora, umjesto građana, jer ne postupa protiv naručitelja studija.

Detaljno je objasnio prekršene procedure dodjele koncesija, naglašavajući da nedostaju ključni dokumenti poput energetske strategije i prostornog plana. Istaknuo je da su ugovori o koncesijama proglašeni "poslovnom tajnom", čak i za javnog tužitelja, što ukazuje na netransparentnost i potencijalnu korupciju.

Dolić je kritizirao i način provođenja javnih rasprava, tvrdeći da ih drže investitori umjesto nadležnih vlasti, te da se javni interes ne proglašava na zakonit način. Podsjetio je na Zakon o izvlaštenju, koji propisuje da se privatno zemljište ne može oduzeti ako sadašnje korištenje donosi veću korist od novog projekta, te je istaknuo da je privatno vlasništvo ustavna kategorija.

Posebno je naglasio problem raspolaganja državnim zemljištem, podsjećajući na Zakon o državnom zemljištu i zabranu raspolaganja, te je upozorio da se koncesije dodjeljuju i na takvom zemljištu.

Kao primjer zlouporabe ovlasti, Dolić je naveo sastav Ministarstva gospodarstva Hercegbosanske županije, gdje su, prema njegovim riječima, ministrica socijalna radnica, a savjetnica odgojiteljica vrtića, bez stručnih kvalifikacija za vođenje tako važnog resora. Zaključio je da takva situacija predstavlja "zlouporabu ovlasti" i da se radi o devastaciji okoliša i prodaji resursa strancima, umjesto o razvoju za dobrobit naroda.

Andrijana Ćaleta je nadopunila Dolićeve tvrdnje, ističući da nikada nije urađen elaborat o zaštiti vodocrpilišta Brišnik, koje je ključno za javnu vodoopskrbu, te da Ministarstvo ne smije izdati dozvolu dok se taj elaborat ne izradi.

magisterium.assessment: Zlouporaba ovlasti u korist privatnog kapitala uz ignoriranje javnog interesa predstavlja tešku povredu socijalne pravednosti.
magisterium.enrichment: Javna vlast mora štititi javni interes, a ne postati sredstvo za promicanje isključivo privatnih probitaka.

magisterium.assessment_en: Abuse of authority in favor of private capital while ignoring public interest represents a serious violation of social justice.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Public authority must protect the public interest, and not become a means for promoting exclusively private gains.

sections.subtitle_en: System in the service of investors: Abuse of authority and ignoring of public interest
sections.screenshot_description_en: Ivan Dolić criticizes the absence of representatives of the Federal Ministry for Energy and accuses the Ministry of serving investors.
sections.content_en: Ivan Dolić expressed indignation due to the absence of representatives of the Federal Ministry of Energy and cantonal authorities at the public debate, emphasizing that they are key for answers to questions about concessions and energy policy. He accused the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism of being in the service of investors, instead of citizens, because it does not act against the study commissioners. He explained in detail the violated procedures for granting concessions, emphasizing that key documents such as the energy strategy and spatial plan are missing. He pointed out that concession agreements have been declared a "business secret", even for the public prosecutor, which indicates non-transparency and potential corruption. Dolić also criticized the way public debates are conducted, claiming that they are held by investors instead of competent authorities, and that public interest is not declared in a lawful manner. He recalled the Expropriation Law, which stipulates that private land cannot be taken if its current use brings greater benefit than the new project, and he emphasized that private property is a constitutional category. He particularly emphasized the problem of state land disposal, recalling the State Land Law and the prohibition of disposal, and warned that concessions are also granted on such land. As an example of abuse of authority, Dolić cited the composition of the Ministry of Economy of Hercegbosanska županija, where, according to him, the minister is a social worker, and the advisor is a kindergarten teacher, without professional qualifications for leading such an important department. He concluded that such a situation represents an "abuse of authority" and that it is about environmental devastation and the sale of resources to foreigners, instead of development for the benefit of the people. Andrijana Ćaleta supplemented Dolić's claims, pointing out that a study on the protection of the Brišnik water source, which is crucial for public water supply, has never been done, and that the Ministry must not issue a permit until that study is prepared.

sections.subtitle: Izostanak lokalnih vlasti i ugroženo vodocrpilište Brišnik: Ključni argumenti protiv vjetroelektrane
sections.screenshot_description: Anđa iz mjesne zajednice kritizira odsutnost lokalnih dužnosnika i objašnjava problem zaštite vodocrpilišta Brišnik.
sections.content: Anđa, predstavnica mjesne zajednice, oštro je kritizirala izostanak lokalnih vlasti, uključujući načelnika i općinske predstavnike, na javnoj raspravi. Istaknula je da nikada nije izrađen elaborat o zaštiti vodocrpilišta Brišnik, koje je ključni dio javne vodoopskrbne mreže. Prema njezinim riječima, investitor je problem zaštite vodocrpilišta proglasio nevažnim za svoj projekt. Anđa je naglasila da se jedna od planiranih turbina (na čestici 1/36) nalazi na samo 600 metara od vodocrpilišta. Dodatno, u toj zoni već postoji jedna trafostanica, a planira se izgradnja još jedne trafostanice i dvije turbine, što bi, da postoji elaborat, bilo unutar zaštićene zone.

magisterium.assessment: Isključivanje lokalne zajednice i ugrožavanje vitalnih resursa poput vode proturječi supsidijarnosti i pravu na život.
magisterium.enrichment: Voda je temeljno pravo i dar Božji; njezino upravljanje zahtijeva solidarnost i zaštitu od privatizacije na štetu zajednice.

Message for the opening of the Campaign of Brotherhood in Brazil 2004 (February 25, 2004) (Pope John Paul II),

magisterium.assessment_en: Exclusion of the local community and endangering vital resources like water contradicts subsidiarity and the right to life.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Water is a fundamental right and a gift of God; its management requires solidarity and protection from privatization to the detriment of the community.

sections.subtitle_en: Absence of local authorities and endangered water source Brišnik: Key arguments against the wind farm
sections.screenshot_description_en: Anđa from the local community criticizes the absence of local officials and explains the problem of protecting the Brišnik water source.
sections.content_en: Anđa, a representative of the local community, sharply criticized the absence of local authorities, including the mayor and municipal representatives, at the public discussion. She pointed out that a study on the protection of the Brišnik water source, which is a key part of the public water supply network, has never been prepared. According to her words, the investor declared the problem of water source protection unimportant for their project. Anđa emphasized that one of the planned turbines (on plot 1/36) is located only 600 meters from the water source. Additionally, there is already one substation in that zone, and the construction of another substation and two turbines is planned, which, if a study existed, would be within the protected zone.

sections.subtitle: Ministarstvo pod pritiskom: Bez elaborata o zaštiti vodocrpilišta nema dozvole
sections.screenshot_description: Anđa izravno upozorava Federalno ministarstvo okoliša i turizma da ne smije izdati dozvolu bez elaborata o zaštiti vodocrpilišta Brišnik.
sections.content: Anđa je izravno upozorila Federalno ministarstvo okoliša i turizma da ne smije izdati nikakvu dozvolu, a pogotovo ne okolišnu suglasnost, za izgradnju vjetroelektrane Gradina sve dok se ne izradi elaborat o zaštiti vodocrpilišta Brišnik. Naglasila je da je to obveza Ministarstva, unatoč tome što lokalne vlasti nisu ispunile svoj dio posla.

magisterium.assessment: Proceduralni pritisak za izradu elaborata je nužan korak, ali ostaje na razini birokratske zaštite bez jamstva stvarne uključenosti.
magisterium.enrichment: Upravljanje resursima zahtijeva suradnju države i privatnog sektora uz strogo poštivanje etičkih kriterija vrijednosti života.

citations.document_title: Message for the opening of the Campaign of Brotherhood in Brazil 2004 (February 25, 2004) (Pope John Paul II),

magisterium.assessment_en: Procedural pressure for the preparation of the study is a necessary step, but remains at the level of bureaucratic protection without guarantee of real involvement.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Resource management requires cooperation of the state and the private sector with strict adherence to ethical criteria of the value of life.

sections.subtitle_en: Ministry under pressure: Without a study on the protection of water sources, there is no permit.
sections.screenshot_description_en: Anđa directly warns the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism that it must not issue a permit without a study on the protection of the Brišnik water source.
sections.content_en: Anđa directly warned the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism that it must not issue any permit, and especially not an environmental approval, for the construction of the Gradina wind farm until a study on the protection of the Brišnik water source is prepared. She emphasized that this is the Ministry's obligation, despite the fact that local authorities have not fulfilled their part of the job.

entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Buka vjetroelektrana: Mještani se šale, ali strahuju od stvarnosti
sections.screenshot_description: Ivica Kelava, vijećnik, šali se na račun buke, ali time naglašava ozbiljnost problema s vjetroelektranama.
sections.content: Vijećnik Općinskog vijeća, Ivica Kelava, pokušao je ublažiti napetu atmosferu šalom o utjecaju buke, referirajući se na glasnoću prethodnog govornika. Međutim, njegova je poanta bila ozbiljna: ako je već sada buka problem, kako će tek biti kada se izgrade nove vjetroelektrane? Time je ponovno istaknuo duboku zabrinutost mještana zbog buke koju stvaraju postojeće i buduće vjetroturbine.

magisterium.assessment: Zanemarivanje straha mještana od buke narušava 'ljudsku ekologiju' i pravo na miran suživot u vlastitom okruženju.
magisterium.enrichment: Zaštita prirode neodvojiva je od zaštite čovjeka; narušavanje okoliša izravno pogađa društvene odnose i mir.

citations.document_title: Caritas in Veritate

magisterium.assessment_en: Disregarding the residents' fear of noise disrupts 'human ecology' and the right to peaceful coexistence in their own environment.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Protection of nature is inseparable from the protection of man; disruption of the environment directly affects social relations and peace.

sections.subtitle_en: Noise of wind farms: Locals joke, but fear reality.
sections.screenshot_description_en: Ivica Kelava, councilor, jokes about the noise, but thereby emphasizes the seriousness of the problem with wind farms.
sections.content_en: Councilor of the Municipal Council, Ivica Kelava, tried to ease the tense atmosphere with a joke about the impact of noise, referring to the loudness of the previous speaker. However, his point was serious: if noise is already a problem now, how will it be when new wind farms are built? With this, he again highlighted the deep concern of the locals due to the noise created by existing and future wind turbines.

sections.subtitle: Planinarske staze i Via Dinarica: Primjedbe Planinarskog društva ostale bez odgovora
sections.screenshot_description: Predstavnica Planinarskog društva Orlova Stina izražava zabrinutost zbog neodgovorenih primjedbi vezanih uz planinarske staze i Via Dinaricu.
sections.content: Predstavnica Planinarskog društva Orlova Stina izrazila je zabrinutost zbog toga što njihove primjedbe, poslane još u studenom prošle godine, nisu dobile odgovor. Primjedbe su se odnosile na utjecaj projekta na planinarske staze, s posebnim naglaskom na međunarodnu stazu Via Dinarica, koja povezuje zemlje Dinarida i kojom prolazi velik broj planinara.

magisterium.assessment: Ignoriranje primjedbi civilnog društva o planinarskim stazama krši načelo sudjelovanja i pravo građana da budu protagonisti razvoja.
magisterium.enrichment: Supsidijarnost zahtijeva da se glas lokalnih i posrednih skupina čuje u oblikovanju odluka koje utječu na njihov život.

magisterium.assessment_en: Ignoring the remarks of civil society about hiking trails violates the principle of participation and the right of citizens to be protagonists of development.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Subsidiarity requires that the voice of local and intermediate groups be heard in the shaping of decisions which affect their life.

sections.subtitle_en: Hiking trails and Via Dinarica: Remarks of the Mountaineering Society remained unanswered
sections.screenshot_description_en: The representative of the Mountaineering Society Orlova Stina expresses concern due to unanswered remarks related to hiking trails and Via Dinarica.
sections.content_en: The representative of the Mountaineering Society Orlova Stina expressed concern because their remarks, sent already in November last year, did not receive a response. The remarks referred to the project's impact on hiking trails, with a special emphasis on the international trail Via Dinarica, which connects the countries of Dinarida and along which a large number of hikers pass.

sections.subtitle: Ministarstvo će provjeriti: Zašto odgovori nisu stigli do Planinarskog društva?
sections.screenshot_description: Maja Bevanda iz Ministarstva obećava provjeru zašto Planinarsko društvo Orlova Stina nije dobilo odgovor na svoje primjedbe.
sections.content: Maja Bevanda iz Federalnog ministarstva okoliša i turizma odgovorila je da su svi koji su pismenim putem dostavili komentare dobili odgovor. Ponudila je provjeru s protokolom kako bi se utvrdilo zašto Planinarsko društvo Orlova Stina nije primilo svoj odgovor, budući da je poziv za javnu raspravu poslan na istu adresu.

magisterium.assessment: Obećanje provjere protokola zbog nedostavljenih odgovora promiče administrativnu odgovornost i ispravlja propuste u komunikaciji s civilnim društvom.
concerns: Prethodni izostanak odgovora narušio je pravo zajednice na informiranost.
magisterium.enrichment: Transparentnost nije samo formalnost, već informacija koja je zajednici dužna radi njezina aktivnog sudjelovanja.

citations.document_title: Instruction "The pastoral conversion of the Parish community"

magisterium.assessment_en: The promise of protocol review due to unsubmitted responses promotes administrative accountability and corrects failures in communication with civil society.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Transparency is not just a formality, but information that is owed to the community for its active participation.
concerns_en: Previous absence of response violated the right of the community to be informed.

sections.subtitle_en: The Ministry will check: Why did the answers not reach the Mountaineering Society?
sections.screenshot_description_en: Maja Bevanda from the Ministry promises a check why Planinarsko društvo Orlova Stina did not receive an answer to its objections.
sections.content_en: Maja Bevanda from the Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism replied that all who submitted comments in writing received a response. She offered to check with the protocol to determine why the Mountaineering Society Orlova Stina did not receive its response, since the invitation for public discussion was sent to the same address.

entities_en: Federal Ministry of Environment and Tourism

sections.subtitle: Kraj rasprave: Zahvala sudionicima
sections.screenshot_description: Maja Bevanda zaključuje javnu raspravu i zahvaljuje svim sudionicima.
sections.content: Maja Bevanda zaključila je javnu raspravu, upitavši sudionike jesu li završili s pitanjima i komentarima, te se zahvalila svima na sudjelovanju.

magisterium.assessment: Završetak rasprave je nužan proceduralni korak koji potvrđuje sudjelovanje, ali sam po sebi ne jamči daljnji utjecaj građana na odluku.
magisterium.enrichment: Istinsko sudjelovanje zahtijeva da subjekti budu ne samo saslušani, već i stvarno uključeni u procese odlučivanja.

citations.document_title: Compendium of the Social Doctrine of the Church

magisterium.assessment_en: The conclusion of the discussion is a necessary procedural step which confirms participation, but in itself does not guarantee further influence of citizens on the decision.
magisterium.enrichment_en: True participation requires that subjects be not only heard, but also truly involved in decision-making processes.

sections.screenshot_description_en: Maja Bevanda concludes the public discussion and thanks all participants.
sections.content_en: Maja Bevanda concluded the public discussion, asking the participants if they had finished with questions and comments, and thanked everyone for participating.
